disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
Next up, the Senate.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38898604/317509183/1329859415?refcode=EM_FR_211122BBB_N_SB_90DO_4_G_TESTA_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGE0Nzk5Zi1iNTRiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VTDEuYjFETRwG0rNXx3KCrGo4rHDLsRr3gQQQKPHY-Y=) Peter,

Even after Republican Minority Leader Kevin McCarthy obstructed our work for hours on end, we’ve done it. _The Build Back Better Act has passed the House!_ Up next, the Senate. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38898605/317509184/1329859415?refcode=EM_FR_211122BBB_N_SB_90DO_4_G_TESTA_p1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGE0Nzk5Zi1iNTRiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VTDEuYjFETRwG0rNXx3KCrGo4rHDLsRr3gQQQKPHY-Y=) The Build Back Better Act will provide **$1.75 trillion in economic relief for millions of hard-working Americans.** The past two years have been hard on everyone. We have a duty to uplift the lives of Americans who are struggling to recover from this pandemic.

To continue our progress in helping the American people, we must hold this seat in 2022. Republicans will do everything in their power to take our Democratic Majority and stifle our progress. name: Salud Carbajal
subject: Thank you for the birthday wishes!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Salud Carbajal for Congress
body:
Thanks to everyone who took a moment last week to sign my virtual birthday card, attend a birthday event or send a message through social media. I appreciated hearing from you all!
I spent much of my birthday on the House floor, proudly casting my vote for President Biden's Build Back Better Act to cut down the cost of living for working families, permanently ban offshore oil and gas leasing off the coast of California, and tackle the climate crisis. I couldn't imagine a better birthday week than having the opportunity to vote for legislation that will make such a critical difference in the everyday lives of millions of Americans.
I am grateful to have the opportunity to keep fighting for you and am honored to have you on my team. In case you missed it, my campaign has informed me that the birthday fundraising page they set up is still active, and all contributions received through it will help us meet our November fundraising goal. [**_Please take a moment to contribute if you can._**](https://act.myngp.com/el/smvNx4uGV8yD5KGzV4pmG-KwYRc-_-hThwgCTlEnSUw=/8VRcbhM3dAxE6roPk5fYd5vA097iKDxUzRwQ3ldLjYk=?am=&recipientId=cDmLEpJFmDvVxlWX7upKG1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)
Thank you again for your support and birthday wishes. I look forward to continuing our work together.
Sincerely,
Salud Carbajal

Paid for by Salud Carbajal for Congress

body:
While a lot of people talk a big game, I know what it takes to put America FIRST and actually WIN for the conservative cause.

| | | | OFFICIAL GOP COMMUNICATION
---
| **\- From the Desk of Mike Pompeo -**
70th Secretary of State I wanted you to make sure you knew about our new organization - CAVPAC - which is focused on pushing back against the radical Left and doing everything in our power to Champion American Values.

When President Trump asked me to become his Secretary of State, I knew it would be an incredible opportunity to make a difference in the lives of so many Americans and to advance the conservative agenda. And that’s exactly what I did.

As a member of the Trump Administration, we secured the border, stood up to Iran, stopped China from stealing American jobs, and stood tall in defense of religious freedom. As President Trump’s top negotiator, I traveled the globe to make the world respect the United States again. We talked the talk and walked the walk.

Now, our nation stands at a crossroads. I have no intention to sit on the sidelines and let the Democrats ruin all the progress we made. It’s absolutely critical to the future of our great nation and the Republican Party that we double down our efforts to protect American values. **That’s why I’ve started a new organization with one mission: Champion American Values. **

If you know me, you know I’m not one to back down in the face of attacks from the radical Left or the mainstream media. With the radical Left imposing their anti-police, pro-tax, big government, socialist agenda on the American people, it’s more important now than ever that we unite to elect conservatives who are willing to stand up for religious freedom, pro-life values, the Second Amendment, a stronger military and the America First agenda.

With CAVPAC, I’m dedicating as many resources as possible to electing principled conservatives all across the country who are willing to stand up to Nancy Pelosi, Chuck Schumer and Joe Biden. We must take back the House and Senate for Republicans, but I can’t do it alone._**Can I count on you to become a Founding Member in our fight?**_

name: Team Kulla
subject: Maybe I’m doing this backwards
body:
I’ve spent the past five months criss-crossing the state, meeting people in their communities, hearing their stories of heartache and hope.I’ve been listening. | | | [](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=619bd671eecd013a7e7a79d3&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.kullafororegon.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D619bd371dd17a71b39ef8fed%26ss_email_id%3D619bd671eecd013a7e7a79d3%26ss_campaign_name%3DMaybe%2BI%25E2%2580%2599m%2Bdoing%2Bthis%2Bbackwards%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2021-11-22T17%253A42%253A32Z&w=605f96f8c17ee25104ffec43&l=en-US&s=YeEUhf1zEHfigi8Xvc7Y_0cheiQ%3D)
---
|
## Maybe I’m doing this backwards
---
---
|
---
| _Casey’s most recent campaign trip was to Hood River and the Dalles_
---
A message from Casey:**I’ve spent the past five months criss-crossing the state, meeting people in their communities, hearing their stories of heartache and hope.****I’ve been listening.** Meanwhile, our team has spent time texting people, sharing my message of urgent action together. What I was “supposed to do,” it turns out, was to call large-dollar donors. All day.Maybe my priorities are backwards? I don’t think so. **Oregonians deserve a Governor who has been to their place** , who knows their coffee shop, their trail, their water system, and their goals. That is the work I have been doing. It is true that dollars are not votes, but Oregonians don’t get a chance to vote for the candidate who they agree with if they don’t hear from them. You have a significant opportunity to help the campaign today, because **for the next 30 days, we have a donor who will match contributions!** Go to [www.kullafororegon.com/donate](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=619bd671eecd013a7e7a79d3&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.kullafororegon.com%2Fdonate%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D619bd371dd17a71b39ef8fed%26ss_email_id%3D619bd671eecd013a7e7a79d3%26ss_campaign_name%3DMaybe%2BI%25E2%2580%2599m%2Bdoing%2Bthis%2Bbackwards%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2021-11-22T17%253A42%253A32Z&w=605f96f8c17ee25104ffec43&l=en-US&s=3SxpeWe6ngqLLUS7M7_IVGKKvAE%3D) to help!We can do this! Thank you!**\- Casey & Team Kulla**
---
[_ _ Donate now!_ _](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=619bd671eecd013a7e7a79d3&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.kullafororegon.com%2Fdonate%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D619bd371dd17a71b39ef8fed%26ss_email_id%3D619bd671eecd013a7e7a79d3%26ss_campaign_name%3DMaybe%2BI%25E2%2580%2599m%2Bdoing%2Bthis%2Bbackwards%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2021-11-22T17%253A42%253A32Z&w=605f96f8c17ee25104ffec43&l=en-US&s=3SxpeWe6ngqLLUS7M7_IVGKKvAE%3D)
---
P.S. Looking for fresh news and more insight into Casey? Check these out:
* [“Future Water Woes Demand Action Today”](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=619bd671eecd013a7e7a79d3&u=https%3A%2F%2Ftheoregonway.substack.com%2Fp%2Ffuture-water-woes-demand-action-today&w=605f96f8c17ee25104ffec43&l=en-US&s=qlTsalDlaCveJOIjZYouJZY--ZU%3D) by Casey, published in _The Oregon Way_
* [“Casey Kulla, the bike-riding Yamhill County Commissioner who wants to be governor”](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=619bd671eecd013a7e7a79d3&u=https%3A%2F%2Fbikeportland.org%2F2021%2F11%2F16%2Fbikeportland-podcast-casey-kulla-the-bike-riding-yamhill-county-commissioner-who-wants-to-be-governor-341331&w=605f96f8c17ee25104ffec43&l=en-US&s=DenpOokfsD_sTDEOgflh8S5lBDM%3D) interview by Jonathan Maus on _BikePortland Podcast_

clean_body: I’ve spent the past five months criss-crossing the state, meeting people in their communities, hearing their stories of heartache and hope.I’ve been listening. | | | | Maybe I’m doing this backwards | | Casey’s most recent campaign trip was to Hood River and the Dalles A message from Casey:I’ve spent the past five months criss-crossing the state, meeting people in their communities, hearing their stories of heartache and hope.I’ve been listening. Meanwhile, our team has spent time texting people, sharing my message of urgent action together. What I was “supposed to do,” it turns out, was to call large-dollar donors. All day.Maybe my priorities are backwards? I don’t think so. Oregonians deserve a Governor who has been to their place , who knows their coffee shop, their trail, their water system, and their goals. That is the work I have been doing. It is true that dollars are not votes, but Oregonians don’t get a chance to vote for the candidate who they agree with if they don’t hear from them. You have a significant opportunity to help the campaign today, because for the next 30 days, we have a donor who will match contributions! Go to to help!We can do this! Thank you!\- Casey & Team Kulla P.S. Looking for fresh news and more insight into Casey? Check these out: by Casey, published in The Oregon Way interview by Jonathan Maus on BikePortland Podcast | Kulla for Oregon, PO Box 1698, McMinnville, OR 97128, United States Powered by

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kathleen?=
subject: Tired of politicians? Then don't vote for them anymore. Hire a representative instead.
body:
Follow me. I want to earn your trust, then your vote. | | | |
---
| | |
## Tired of the same thing, different cycle?
It's the classic "chicken or the egg" conundrum. Are we so divided because our politicians are so divisive, or are they just pandering to what we really are as a community? Our problem is that we keep electing politicians. Let's break the cycle. Elect a representative instead. Elect Kathleen Brown.
---
|
---
| [DONATE NOW!](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=a8aafb5401&e=4712f71bea "DONATE NOW!")
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
### We are different.
I believe that the people of the 13th District are so much better, so much smarter, and so much braver than the people who seem to get in office right now. I'm interviewing for the most important job I could have--representing you and your family. Look up my qualifications. Listen to what I have to say. Ask me hard questions. This is a serious job. You deserve my full attention.
|
---
| [ ](https://kathleenfortx.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=09fca73837c97c9ddd5e5e266&id=71a3df76c2&e=4712f71bea)
---
### One last thing.
I can't do this without your help. Check out my website to volunteer and donate.
|
---
| |
### Pass it on.
This is a grassroots campaign by one of your own. The best messenger is you. Let your friends, family, neighbors, and co-workers know there is a better choice for this district.

name: Mike Lee
subject: Take back education from the Feds
body:
The federal government and radical activists are taking control of education at an alarming rate.
_Sponsored message_
[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zhhrg8gta1ggg58kkv2aon2ci3em2fqne0rgoig0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cdg62o34c9h2bs)

Friend,

The federal government and radical activists are taking control of education at an alarming rate. Here's what's happening:

* The Department of Justice and FBI agents are being used to "monitor" parents at school board meetings.
* Critical Race Theory and other Anti-American & pro-socialism curriculum is being distributed in universities, high schools, and even elementary schools.
* Democrats are openly talking about removing parents from the education system entirely.

Fortunately, I believe there is a solution that can take back education from the Fed and radical activists.

_My personal friend Connor Boyack is the author of the Tuttle Twins, a series of children 's books teaching kids about free markets, private property rights, and the ideas of our Founding Fathers. He is on a mission to distribute an additional 1,000,000 copies of the books into the hands of homeschool families, public schools, and libraries_.

[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zp1p0luo4ppodh0a23lio6gb9i9evmnrsnr550h0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cdg62o34c9h2bs)
_(Here I am with Connor Boyack, the author of the Tuttle Twins childrens book series. The Tuttle Twins books are teaching the rising generation about the ideas of liberty, free markets, and entrepreneurship.[ You can help Connor distribute more copies by clicking here to donate](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2za7rfjla7nk0kblnsg94jk3uds6an152hv90bo6o_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cdg62o34c9h2bs).)_

I met Connor in 2010 when he helped me win my first campaign for the U.S. Senate. He's since become a good friend of mine and was inspired to write the Tuttle Twins book series to teach his own kids about the ideas of liberty.

[_**It costs roughly $10 to produce and distribute one copy of the Tuttle Twins. You can help Connor distribute more copies by clicking here to donate $10 or more! **_](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zeb8fvdadh63hbum3efq1musvp1d90ondm7q09ag_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cdg62o34c9h2bs)

Over 3 MILLION of the Tuttle Twins have been distributed to families across the country. What do the Tuttle Twins books teach the rising generation about?
* Personal responsibility
* Individual liberty
* How free markets work
* How entrepreneurship can solve problems
* Treat others with respect -- Don't hurt people and don't steal their stuff
* Why big government can be dangerous

The best part about the Tuttle Twins? Kids actually enjoy reading them.

Parents aren't forcing their kids to read them. They are written for children to enjoy and learn at the same time.

You and I can take back education from the Feds and radical activists by teaching the rising generation about the ideas of liberty with the Tuttle Twins!

I told Connor I would help him raise $20,000 to help him and Libertas Institute distribute more copies of the Tuttle Twins to families and young students across the country. _**Please consider donating the most generous amount you can to help put a Tuttle Twins book in the hands of a young child!**_

[**Donate 1 Tuttle Twins book for $10 Here >>>**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zh557uu9r2j4rfi21qouieb3fuc5k3el74orldjg_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cdg62o34c9h2bs)
[**Donate 2 Tuttle Twins book for $20 Here >>>**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2znal9d8n8qu880fie2psqf1c2e403eufh5go09g8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cdg62o34c9h2bs)
[**Donate 5 Tuttle Twins book for $50 Here >>>**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2ztms4p340i9uabqsir8aughkb1jflkl1kf5viu1o_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cdg62o34c9h2bs)
[**Donate 10 Tuttle Twins book for $100 Here >>>**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zoq4f1t8vtpgi1pg0s2h5s1q414vl8u79lit2bu0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cdg62o34c9h2bs)
[**Donate 25 Tuttle Twins book for $250 Here >>>**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zpbhumv398q71qnjvtt8noguq62qndeg3vlbrbg0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cdg62o34c9h2bs)
[**Donate 50 Tuttle Twins book for $500 Here >>>**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zrde3d87dq5mn2l5oqs4n048gimj4bvt9sbp8ms0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cdg62o34c9h2bs)
[**Donate 100 Tuttle Twins book for $1,000 Here >>>**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z3jsjidj74ujcpsullt4g4chv85q06bk1itt3uro_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cdg62o34c9h2bs)
[**Donate Any Amount Here >>>**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2ztnoi6vd8mvt3k5hhb94ispuflbtqtp80r5m7go0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cdg62o34c9h2bs)

**Here 's the hard truth: **Politicians will not solve this problem.

I wish I could tell you I could pass a bill that eliminates leftwing bias in the classroom, abolish Critical Race Theory instantly, and empower parents.

Yes, I will do everything in my power to do all of those things as I am allowed to do within the confines of obeying the Constitution...

But taking back education from the Feds means patriots need to get involved in education and provide students with alternatives.

_**This is the most promising path to save our kids from indoctrination and the dangers of socialism. You and I can create a new generation of young conservatives to preserve our Republic. **_

I am inviting you to be a part of the solution.

My goal is to help Connor raise $20,000 to help him and Libertas Institute distribute more copies of the Tuttle Twins, including a new American History series they are working on!

[**You can click here to donate $10, $20, $50, $100, $500, $1,000 or ANY amount to support the Tuttle Twins.**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z2l7t07pdlsi1pq1ufak71mofus9ces3um8qitb0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cdg62o34c9h2bs)

Thank you, friend.

****
Senator Mike Lee
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for National Republican Polling, [please use this preferences page](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/prefs/9z2zrhhupk58d1ehp6j9ro0pg170ija8jq3dhu5408o).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zh1p7hp6jusbu9v2l0tainq94mjrju3upjtirva8_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or6cthm0ob0chh649fg)

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: Fighting Brandon's Mandates From Brandon, FL
body:
When the American people don’t immediately bend to the whims of Joe Biden, he doesn’t get to impose his will through mandate
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z18dcid05gu7oo2631cro1t0onup01env9rgojpg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf2t5hehh79c3ic1hmcojj69j3epdj6jibcsj66ph3aspi6oonap9gephrcspn6srt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coo75ddjcur68phkcsqr6ptgmlin48d245p25oh4cdj6eor0c5g62or24no)
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zp7q0giffjrl8q0j0o7j3ql85q7udhq0pldrk5v8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cdg62o31cdh2bs)
Friend --
When the American people don't immediately bend to the whims of Joe Biden, he doesn't get to impose his will through mandates and executive edicts. Biden and Fauci have gone from 15 days to slow the spread to 3 jabs to keep your job.
**Fortunately for all of us, the Constitution - and the State of Florida - are standing in Joe Biden's way.**
I called the Florida Legislature into Special Session to protect people's jobs and personal freedoms. _**And today, I signed four pieces of legislation from the Keep Florida Free agenda to PROTECT FREEDOM in Florida.**_
**[HELP ME CONTINUE THE FIGHT TO PROTECT FREEDOM IN FLORIDA](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zc46t81j19uk9reuur1100feg6757pq3hr0ceeeg_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cdg62o31cdh2bs)**
These bills ENSURE that the rights, liberties, and freedoms of all Floridians are protected against the whims of power-hungry politicians and incompetent government bureaucrats with a God complex.
**Signing these bills into law is a victory for:**
✅ Every worker in Florida who can go to sleep tonight knowing they can wake up tomorrow without the dread of having to decide between putting food on the table for their family or getting a jab in the arm.
✅ Every student who was harmed by being forced to wear a mask for hours on end while at school.
✅ Every parent who knows THEY are the ones who should be making medical decisions for their children, NOT the government.
✅ Every Floridian who has been unfairly burdened by the ideological, anti-science agendas of Democrats from local school boards all the way to the White House.
**[HELP ME FIGHT BACK AGAINST JOE BIDEN'S UNCONSTITUTIONAL MANDATES](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zasf33pb6eoeb2eko7dcpenoe52s30feh24mfd90_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cdg62o31cdh2bs)**
What Joe Biden wants to do is not only unconstitutional, it is flat wrong. Had Florida not stepped in to defend freedom from government overreach, lockdowns, mandates, and business closures, we'd be living in a Faucian dystopia today.
I stepped in Biden and Fauci's way because defending your freedom is the right thing to do. I've been proud to stand next to parents, workers, and students as I fight for freedom.
**Leadership means doing all you can to stand by people. That is what we did today in Florida.**
Friend, the fight for freedom is upon us, but I can assure you I'm just getting started. **[Chip in $100, $50, or $25 to help me continue this uphill battle to protect our freedom and liberty in the great state of Florida.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdr2orf1u8hgre2jift5kkhue6vcfov1mgjuj7v8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cdg62o31cdh2bs)**
Thank you for your continued support,
Sincerely,
Ron DeSantis

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3pbol1e4bn2bjcf67aoad2ld0ljs9p0uv8arpho_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cdg62o31cdh2bs "FIGHT BACK") [FIGHT BACK](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zivcpfb7i7kn8769fs4m8v55c5gb275ct21jrcf0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cdg62o31cdh2bs)
---

Paid by Ron DeSantis, Republican, for Governor

Ron DeSantis for Governor | 610 S. Boulevard, Tampa, FL 33606

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for GOP Presidential, [please use this preferences page](http://e.goppresidential.com/prefs/9z2zohjnqlu7ksf01vb4vkurbt31metst85lbv19r9o).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgetimlmoedfo680rlga1pmdcko441to8i4051fg_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cdg62o31cdh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

Thank you for your continued support, Sincerely, Ron DeSantis "FIGHT BACK" Paid by Ron DeSantis, Republican, for Governor Ron DeSantis for Governor | 610 S. name: Ron Hanks
subject: I’ve never been on the fence
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hanks US Senate
body:
The mainstream media and their Democrat handlers don't want you to see my message. Establishment Republicans don’t want me to
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zb23iiaibr5eilu26aahgkv24stp5esesi4kpdso_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbqj0srme5jb0phgeir6aojic2qjaotjccq74pbjmdjj0t9nmmqnapbjc2qe4crnmv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3imtj32dpjc9g7eob662ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933cpjm6o31cji68oh5u)

Dear patriot, The mainstream media and their Democrat handlers don't want you to see my message. Establishment Republicans don’t want me to speak about election integrity. But I’m a conservative leader who won’t be silenced. I’ve proven my mettle, and in the tough battles ahead, you’ll know where I stand – because I have a record to prove it. **I’m Ron Hanks, THE conservative Republican running for the U.S. Senate in Colorado.** I’m the only candidate in this race willing to fight for election integrity and forensic audits. We must restore the faith of American voters in our election process. **I’m the only Colorado legislator to attend the Arizona audit and the Cyber Symposium in South Dakota.** Here’s what I know: there is a cloud of doubt over Joe Biden’s election, and he is unfit for office. I will keep fighting to remove him. Democrat Senator Michael Bennet has proven to be Biden’s finest quisling, and Bennet has laid prostrate before every unconstitutional edict. Dems and the yellow media have put a target on my back. Their lies are contemptible, and they strive to divide America with false statements and dishonest arguments. I will never stop fighting, but I need strong conservatives like you to watch my back. **Are you in?** | [**Join the campaign**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zvaacjml7s52s50f4emt6lbufn7iu0cqt06jr1mo_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cdg62p74chh2bs)
---
The Radical Left and their RINO enablers in Washington don’t want me in the US Senate. THAT is the best endorsement I could have. Democrats know fellow-leftist Michael Bennet is vulnerable, and they are terrified Bennet will be replaced by a strong conservative that puts America First, like I do. And their squishy Republican allies have establishment-favorite candidates that won’t rock the boat.
Believe me, we NEED to rock this boat. I’ve rocked the boat in the Colorado House, and then held our soft Republican minority leader accountable for bad votes and weak leadership.
I will do the same to Mitch McConnell or any career politician so self-absorbed they ignore the destruction Joe Biden and the Dems are unleashing.
**I’m running to restore and secure our constitutional Republic.** I am NOT running to relocate for a long political career, to enjoy swank social events, put my kids thru the best private schools and then retire in DC.
I love the American West, and I’ve already had a full career. I’m proud to have served my country for 32 years in the U.S. Air Force – as an enlisted man and a commissioned officer. I fought and served around the world to defend this country and our freedoms. Those world-wide experiences and the men and women I served with shaped me.
I ran for office as an extension of military service, and the people saw fit to elect me to the Colorado House of Representatives. I remain grateful for their trust and confidence.
As a state legislator, I made restoring liberty the foundation of my career.
**But you don’t have to take my word for it – I have a REAL record of fighting for our conservative values.**
* I have fought and will continue to fight to secure our elections.
* **I have fought and will continue to fight to protect our right to keep and bear arms.**
* I have fought and will fight the tyranny the government imposes on your family.
* I have fought and will fight to protect the unborn.
* I have fought for law and order, and I will fight for border security.

But, I need your help.
[**JOIN THE CAMPAIGN - FLIP THE SENATE**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zi2te0aan2d0hfbrbt3pr8jodph2id4alpdu7ek8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cdg62p74chh2bs)
---
One of the important lessons we’re learning from elections in Virginia and New Jersey is when conservatives fight smart and fight hard, we win. It is time to double-down on bold leadership from authentic conservative Republicans. Count me in.
But I can’t do it without your help.
**The formula to send Joe Biden home, his handlers packing, and his enablers – like Sen Bennet – into retirement IS simple. But it won’t be easy.**
I need the backing of conservative patriots like you. Will you join my campaign today?
Your contribution to my campaign for U.S. Senate will send a LOUD and CLEAR message to the Democrat radicals and Establishment Republicans that Americans want conservative leadership.
**[Can I count on your contribution today?](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z4hddoftbt6g0aaqalvge7ek4olmls25bvhqes4o_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cdg62p74chh2bs)**
[** <<< CONTRIBUTE $200 >>> **](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zt9clre52ju5h966tvi9umsocgu3vkuc50n5jc7o_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cdg62p74chh2bs)
---
[** <<< CONTRIBUTE $100 >>> **](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zh0i99urbq2vt97asesmhjt4vncv88amdrm1tb3o_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cdg62p74chh2bs)
---
[** <<< CONTRIBUTE $50 >>> **](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zf3hfla8fivfomk3v316l5bdobvjib4q14prkgr8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cdg62p74chh2bs)
---
[** <<< CONTRIBUTE $25 >>> **](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztkh0k7e9gv4b64stnep2mt2pfc26ggotfli7ml0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cdg62p74chh2bs)
---
[** <<< CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT >>> **](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zk67ltug5klkduftmkppivf4g01cr0fp27e5dleg_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cdg62p74chh2bs)
---
Contribute TODAY to show your support for my campaign to flip the U.S. Senate with a REAL conservative Republican leader.
Thank you!
For America,

\- Ron

Conservative for US Senate
State Representative - Colorado
P.S. They don’t want me to talk about election integrity.
But I’m the kind of conservative leader who won’t be silenced.
**I’m Ron Hanks and I’m THE CONSERVATIVE Republican running for the U.S. Senate in Colorado.**
I’m running against one of Joe Biden’s chief stooges in the U.S. Senate -- Michael Bennet -- to restore faith in American election integrity.
**I’m the only candidate in this race who’s willing to talk about election integrity, about forensic audits, about restoring the faith of ordinary American voters in our election process.**
That’s why I have a target on my back. I need to know conservatives like you have my back.
Will you join my campaign today?
[**JOIN THE CAMPAIGN - FLIP THE SENATE**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zeh4gdnnpt5qdq2svmrmdcr3sgcdprepo46nt9h8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cdg62p74chh238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kui3ccbkmupr785k6erbcspnm9r3fcdnm9q32dtjkorrbdt6eirj7dt566qjccbkmuprb95jm5qjecjkm5qfb9jle1o7fcjhekp7f9v5e5qrflhk6mo78d5n6equ4o32chi68oj2ccin2tdnqorr7cbl6eonbp0h2e8249fg)
---

| | Paid for by Hanks US Senate
---

Contributions to Hanks US Senate are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited. To contribute by mail, please send a personal check made payable to _Hanks US Senate_ to: PO Box 117, Penrose, CO 81240. Please include your full name, address, email address, occupation and employer in the envelope.

name: Mike Schmuhl
subject: We’re just getting started
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38902051/317524286/405560545?refcode=Web.stickybutton.&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjRjMzZjYS1jMTRiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BM1ThwO1Jzkx06nPBgW1RTclMR35WL9KRVcUEiHdPcE=) Good afternoon! Earlier this year, we made a promise to Indiana Democrats — and all Hoosier voters — that we would start showing up everywhere to listen to folks, tell how common sense and popular policies can create a better future for our state, and push back against partisan extremism. Indiana Democrats delivered on this promise and we haven’t stopped sharing how Democrats are delivering for families. Last week, we just wrapped up our _fourth_ tour in _five_ months. In total, we’ve visited **55 counties** in the Hoosier State -- and you helped power our work. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38902052/317524287/405560545?refcode=Web.stickybutton.&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjRjMzZjYS1jMTRiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BM1ThwO1Jzkx06nPBgW1RTclMR35WL9KRVcUEiHdPcE=) Congressmen Andre Carson and Frank Mrvan have led on and supported transformative measures in Congress like the American Rescue Plan and [The Jobs Act](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38902053/317524288/-722644037?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjRjMzZjYS1jMTRiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BM1ThwO1Jzkx06nPBgW1RTclMR35WL9KRVcUEiHdPcE=&emci=2012f26f-af4b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=4f4c36ca-c14b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=4925535). Because of this work, more vaccines got into Hoosiers’ arms, more than $350 million was provided to the state to expand broadband access, about $540 million is being used to alleviate the state’s childcare crisis, and every single county and nearly each municipal community - large and small - has received relief that’ll help Hoosiers build back better from COVID-19. Statehouse Democrats have delivered for Hoosiers too. The Indiana Black Legislative Caucus passed criminal justice reform and thanks to the American Rescue Plan, the state’s public schools were provided funding not seen in over a decade, educators received a much-needed pay raise, and the state’s READI program is delivering economic opportunity across Indiana. Indiana Democrats delivered at the statehouse and in Congress, but we also wanted to celebrate these accomplishments with Hoosiers in every community. **It’s time to show Hoosiers directly what Democratic values are and what our policies do -- instead of being labeled through misinformation, disinformation, fake news, and conspiracy theories promoted on the other side.** We’re neighbors, friends, coworkers, family members, and Hoosiers -- and it’s imperative we fight back and show we care more about the well-being of all families rather than fulfilling partisan agendas. So, what did we do? Indiana Democrats got to work. And thanks to our county parties and leaders like Joe Donnelly, John Gregg, Baron Hill, Jill Long Thompson, Eddie Melton, Fady Qaddoura, Shelli Yoder, Robin Shackleford, Mike Andrade, Maureen Bauer, and Phil GiaQuinta, Democrats hit the road and held 63 field events in more than 55 counties. This includes:
* 24 American Rescue Plan tour events
* 19 American Jobs Plan tour stops
* 5 Redistricting Tour press conferences
* 15 Small Town, Indiana community events

Folks, Indiana Democrats got back to work in 2021. But, we’re just getting started because there’s so much more work to get done ahead of the 2022 state and midterm elections, the 2023 municipal elections, and the 2024 gubernatorial and state elections. We must work overtime to elect Democratic leaders in every community possible. We must create this better future for Hoosier families, because we know what alternative is in store for our state if we do not step up. Hoosiers have seen what the other side has offered -- and it’s nothing but extreme politics. Not one Indiana Republican supported the American Rescue Plan, The Jobs Act, and the once-in-a-generation jobs and infrastructure investments for our families. Instead, the Indiana Republican Party endorsed misinformation, conspiracy theories, and extreme partisanship -- just for partisan gamesmanship focused on power, control, money, and self-interest. Instead of joining Democrats, Hoosiers saw Republicans like Todd Young, Victoria Spartz, and Jackie Walorski vote NO on these laws. They campaigned on conspiracies that just don’t exist in Indiana. And, they heard these elected officials describe bread and butter issues they’ve campaigned on for years -- like broadband internet and infrastructure -- as “socialism”. You read that right. Republicans are calling basic utilities and services they campaign on and even use as “socialism” because...partisanship. These Republicans have become too extreme and too partisan for Indiana, and throughout the 2022 campaign, it’s absolutely essential for Democrats to make sure voters in all 92 counties know Republicans abandoned them when it mattered most. When it was time to deliver COVID-19 relief, Democrats delivered while Republicans downplayed the deadly virus. When it was time to pass transformational infrastructure investments, Democrats delivered while Republicans ignored you. **[We need you to chip in a little bit right now by clicking here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38902054/317524289/405560545?refcode=Web.stickybutton.&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjRjMzZjYS1jMTRiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BM1ThwO1Jzkx06nPBgW1RTclMR35WL9KRVcUEiHdPcE=)** This is what we must run on for 2022 (and beyond). We cannot let our foot off the gas just because of our work this year. It’s time we dig deep and campaign in every county, in every community, and for every Hoosier vote. We accomplished a lot this year, and we have a lot to be thankful for, but we’re just getting started. [We hope you'll join us on the road next year to help Democrats create a better future for the families we love and the state we call home.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38902055/317524290/405560545?refcode=Web.stickybutton.&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjRjMzZjYS1jMTRiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BM1ThwO1Jzkx06nPBgW1RTclMR35WL9KRVcUEiHdPcE=) Sincerely, Mike Schmuhl Chairman - Indiana Democratic Party Indiana Democratic Party
115 W Washington
INDLPS, IN 46202
United States | | | Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party. www.indems.org Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
---

name: Team Durbin
subject: A make-or-break moment for our Senate majority
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
It’s up to us to defend vulnerable Democratic Senators up for reelection.
#
We need to step up, Peter.
It’s up to us to defend vulnerable Democratic Senators up for reelection, including **Senator Maggie Hassan in New Hampshire** and **Senator Catherine Cortez Masto in Nevada.**
**[Can we count on you to pitch in $5 or any amount to keep the Senate blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38902306/317525457/-2115241942?refcode=dd_em_211122_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTU0YTRkYi1jMzRiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H9cMGVDHovCyGML07pZrMB7TIjE2YEfWRC8F8uVpYoo=)**
Senator Hassan and Senator Cortez Masto have been instrumental in leading key initiatives that help American families, including the infrastructure bill.
_**And both of these Democratic women are history-makers:**_ Catherine Cortez Masto is the first and only Latina elected to the U.S. Senate. Maggie Hassan is only the second woman in American history to be elected both Governor and U.S. Senator.
We need these Democratic women in the Senate to keep making progress for the American people.
_But Republicans are working overtime to unseat these Democratic champions_ and reinstall Mitch McConnell as the Senate Majority Leader. **We can’t let that happen, Peter.**
**[We need to keep the Senate blue. Will you chip in $5 or any amount to reelect Senator Hassan and Senator Cortez Masto -- and defend our Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38902307/317525458/-2115241942?refcode=dd_em_211122_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTU0YTRkYi1jMzRiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=H9cMGVDHovCyGML07pZrMB7TIjE2YEfWRC8F8uVpYoo=)**
Thank you,
Team Durbin

name: Jake Evans for Congress
subject: Jake: McBath’s exit points to huge conservative comeback
body:
Jake Evans, the America First Republican in the 6th Congressional District race, said Rep. Lucy McBath move to the 7th District reflects the fact that her record is far too liberal for her district’s voters.
---
| | | | | |
---
| | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE Nov. 22, 2021 Contact: (470) 588-2028, news@jakeevans.org
Jake: McBath's exit points to huge conservative comeback Jake Evans, the America First Republican in the Sixth Congressional District race, said Rep. Lucy McBath's flip to the Seventh District reflects the fact that her record is far too liberal for her district's voters. "Lucy McBath has provided Biden and Pelosi unquestioning support for an agenda that has led to reckless spending, crippling inflation, a crisis at our border and, soon to come, big tax hikes," said Jake. "It's a record that won't fly in the Sixth District, and it's no wonder she has fled to another district. Our voters are ready for the Great American Comeback with the leadership of a bold and unafraid America First conservative. I will stand up for lower taxes, less spending, strong borders, election integrity, the sanctity of life, and the Second Amendment, and I will fight against vaccine mandates and the indoctrination of our children with CRT. I have been in this race for almost five months to fight for the people, not for political opportunism or special interests."

clean_body: Jake Evans, the America First Republican in the 6th Congressional District race, said Rep. Lucy McBath move to the 7th District reflects the fact that her record is far too liberal for her district’s voters. | | | | | | | | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE Nov. 22, 2021 Contact: (470) 588-2028, news@jakeevans.org Jake: McBath's exit points to huge conservative comeback Jake Evans, the America First Republican in the Sixth Congressional District race, said Rep. Lucy McBath's flip to the Seventh District reflects the fact that her record is far too liberal for her district's voters. "Lucy McBath has provided Biden and Pelosi unquestioning support for an agenda that has led to reckless spending, crippling inflation, a crisis at our border and, soon to come, big tax hikes," said Jake. "It's a record that won't fly in the Sixth District, and it's no wonder she has fled to another district. Our voters are ready for the Great American Comeback with the leadership of a bold and unafraid America First conservative. I will stand up for lower taxes, less spending, strong borders, election integrity, the sanctity of life, and the Second Amendment, and I will fight against vaccine mandates and the indoctrination of our children with CRT. I have been in this race for almost five months to fight for the people, not for political opportunism or special interests." == == == | | | | Jake Evans for Congress | P.O. Box 1483, Roswell, GA 30077 | | Sent by mailto:news@jakeevans.org powered by

name: Mia McLeod
subject: the road ahead of us

body:
I’m counting on your support. | | | _Mia McLeod is running to become our next governor because she has the experience and the courage to build a South Carolina that’s as strong as we are. If you no longer want to receive updates from our campaign, you can[unsubscribe here.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4G3cdy8v6-1NSOaVSJqG3IJkPdgquBxFNnSpiFvELjP1aa5c5x2Mio0YKxl2MsaUqBQ23KBQXw032-w8FDQgiI8NknykhEx4poQH2kH1wa_bFMEgPERXkSAB-JDXTwv_8mhkFd51b--2VnDYCv1Q8aX1s2bWQ3kjEl96joshAMvK17Vt0BNJ8AknKeOON7KShoptVFQfDA5j6_qs4Ujh7I8BfV_B_cDMdwGKr3m-PlRaRadpGQTpnCoJ0PccwIhpPmj8YNUIGuZUKhSmjJjgzbX937ehwaAEnRPnAsecIkpScebRuuskDn3mVwW8uuUMH5o8ecvRu742oMWQ5p2dgH4w/3h8/cYyD7xmySRiqqlyDRG67IA/h0/7MKGPXXSUiGS11Ozsq-vIblv-HUR7x-9kFF9A8B5RLk)_ My roots are as South Carolina as they come. Friend, I understand the challenges and joys South Carolina families face because I’ve faced them myself. Too often, I’ve seen our best and brightest go to other states in search of a better education and high-paying job opportunities. This has to stop. I’m committed to fully investing in education and bringing jobs back home to ensure South Carolina is the best place to raise a family. **Before we can build a South Carolina where everyone can prosper, we need to build a campaign that’s ready to withstand everything the GOP machine will throw our way in order to slow us down.** **[Join our movement to build a South Carolina that’s as strong as we are by making a contribution today.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xOVKxhIUbYt3VKvuRN9Ed63_PAh0W031LcZnsGBosTPsUbMsF92XKV5RxbcLdZafyAaEZTMQESp2vUG2Th8rcftLmCfdJYsPGhDwvER492090FMLZzLPn9nBFSzPhOqfmYz9oJhUq9uy9Y9KdAw048jFzryNZW2fKzGTsPk-c4ea9Q7yD0adb9BI_4-T-pNGjNnYkSa4SFTPSdyNJ8on-I5L8xiCcYYIox80hyjxhXQarqu90hsmnDavqfhedeGPS8rEx2IJ1EukXCbfhcLvXnFpG1q0VznObVEGteB0LJhTfO4KIvLSi25ZYtSXAYcqI/3h8/cYyD7xmySRiqqlyDRG67IA/h1/9JcWF3zE4udaNP--fBnpg0TG-IjJ_GvIcsM4mj44Y68)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [express donate: $10](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xOVKxhIUbYt3VKvuRN9Ed63_PAh0W031LcZnsGBosTPluAXS9a5t5NQqlgab6e3qa3AbdnENSv2YrCvVjMqe0ZofBv-Z7PLY5Mh8yEB9dL00gU_DR3YrkZ2C5j0Re1-MZooUMTtXVMHcYjelAqHDPxKC1cl8tltvWepf29iAlVC7z28yEvP6CqfuaP9ctZS4gE8pF7ZCgii4nRLeX-p9ltKli_KaeYsew0yNMXn5rbTKzQir4209hUXAcV_bHX_I7Nve2vT02mxESJoeI4hS2O9-TkjxRm68gQPeFST6OeHVDHlygyRXrPPvWM1yUzrJqRZ-Dr9c4wEBi8jy57sLklxlU4UxUjXHKY8JSRBciBEw/3h8/cYyD7xmySRiqqlyDRG67IA/h2/1aSRESagV7uU9MCTNOYhdFhe1osQg-zCqpszrZ3_Kek)

Friend, we’ve got a lot of work ahead of us to build a movement that’s ready to shake up politics as usual and put power back into the hands of South Carolinians.
Our state hasn’t had a Democrat in the Governor’s Office in nearly two decades! But if the last year has taught us anything, it’s that too many of South Carolina’s so-called “leaders” only care about themselves.
**And I’m ready to make history because now, more than ever, these times have called for change.**
**[Now’s our time to stand up to the good ole boys’ club and politicians who only look out for themselves. Will you help me stand up for all our communities by pitching in $10 or whatever amount you are able to today?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xOVKxhIUbYt3VKvuRN9Ed63_PAh0W031LcZnsGBosTPsUbMsF92XKV5RxbcLdZafzQtZLaN9IwJMDeW0RKnnl0zGAzcLpzrkUnvcbfy-tumGzFdMD6_t84RtJNpiETdbZla4e8yxZ60VET7KYGPftvD8AanArO5TfAEQh6n-0vjHWIcPqCjlmU5ubulTmeuKvF3WWB-wGBPyUV-uJo53q_nnf6CvEHvhnS-kvxUhHrY2ESWk-g-tJXgmSpi_dcee32mSn0hU2XavvRlPB419RvjMufMizXxUh3kJbXS7lyUoX34y6ESYFZ7NSmae_4Rww/3h8/cYyD7xmySRiqqlyDRG67IA/h8/VDUjR9EeIIKK6jiADICAO5iHHf4BLhpCPFIrjNyzs8M)**

clean_body: I’m counting on your support. | | | Mia McLeod is running to become our next governor because she has the experience and the courage to build a South Carolina that’s as strong as we are. If you no longer want to receive updates from our campaign, you can My roots are as South Carolina as they come. Friend, I understand the challenges and joys South Carolina families face because I’ve faced them myself. Too often, I’ve seen our best and brightest go to other states in search of a better education and high-paying job opportunities. This has to stop. I’m committed to fully investing in education and bringing jobs back home to ensure South Carolina is the best place to raise a family. Before we can build a South Carolina where everyone can prosper, we need to build a campaign that’s ready to withstand everything the GOP machine will throw our way in order to slow us down. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Friend, we’ve got a lot of work ahead of us to build a movement that’s ready to shake up politics as usual and put power back into the hands of South Carolinians. Our state hasn’t had a Democrat in the Governor’s Office in nearly two decades! But if the last year has taught us anything, it’s that too many of South Carolina’s so-called “leaders” only care about themselves. And I’m ready to make history because now, more than ever, these times have called for change. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | We need affordable healthcare for everyone, not just those who can afford it. We need equitable access to quality education, no matter what zip code you live in. We need to not just rebuild, but ensure our communities are stronger, and more resilient than ever. Thank you for believing in our movement, — Mia Please, disregard if you are a registered lobbyist. | | | Paid for by Mia for South Carolina | | Sent via . name: Ron DeSantis
subject: Fighting Brandon's Mandates From Brandon, FL
body:
[View this message in your browser](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsfjmgfisbh8a32askjjbu1fsi8qbi8jinl1apho_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cdg6eor4cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2sjlemo72sjk6ipr7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65sr5c1r3edhks5ge3c3769q39d1m69p37cpgmti6epbgs3j34tlmcsrb4stlc3g6fkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1pbephh6spmadtie5j30s5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zfu14e1f7kje400q7gdf6d993nq6a3g9g024p3bo_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cdg6eor4cph2bs)
Friend --
When the American people don't immediately bend to the whims of Joe Biden, he doesn't get to impose his will through mandates and executive edicts. Biden and Fauci have gone from 15 days to slow the spread to 3 jabs to keep your job.
**Fortunately for all of us, the Constitution - and the State of Florida - are standing in Joe Biden's way.**
I called the Florida Legislature into Special Session to protect people's jobs and personal freedoms. _**And today, I signed four pieces of legislation from the Keep Florida Free agenda to PROTECT FREEDOM in Florida.**_
**[HELP ME CONTINUE THE FIGHT TO PROTECT FREEDOM IN FLORIDA](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlbi5e2osnlhblh2fi9leajcktkv6jp64vtjc8o8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cdg6eor4cph2bs)**
These bills ENSURE that the rights, liberties, and freedoms of all Floridians are protected against the whims of power-hungry politicians and incompetent government bureaucrats with a God complex.
**Signing these bills into law is a victory for:**
✅ Every worker in Florida who can go to sleep tonight knowing they can wake up tomorrow without the dread of having to decide between putting food on the table for their family or getting a jab in the arm.
✅ Every student who was harmed by being forced to wear a mask for hours on end while at school.
✅ Every parent who knows THEY are the ones who should be making medical decisions for their children, NOT the government.
✅ Every Floridian who has been unfairly burdened by the ideological, anti-science agendas of Democrats from local school boards all the way to the White House.
**[HELP ME FIGHT BACK AGAINST JOE BIDEN'S UNCONSTITUTIONAL MANDATES](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zp08tf84lt7hmh2p8ab94o76tqsstebt1f7l6s0g_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cdg6eor4cph2bs)**
What Joe Biden wants to do is not only unconstitutional, it is flat wrong. Had Florida not stepped in to defend freedom from government overreach, lockdowns, mandates, and business closures, we'd be living in a Faucian dystopia today.
I stepped in Biden and Fauci's way because defending your freedom is the right thing to do. I've been proud to stand next to parents, workers, and students as I fight for freedom.
**Leadership means doing all you can to stand by people. That is what we did today in Florida.**
Friend, the fight for freedom is upon us, but I can assure you I'm just getting started. **[Chip in $100, $50, or $25 to help me continue this uphill battle to protect our freedom and liberty in the great state of Florida.](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zk76o68sljcq42l0nkq8v5jgv0i1lll8cqgafci8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cdg6eor4cph2bs)**
Thank you for your continued support,
Sincerely,
Ron DeSantis

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmg9cb7oa8lgvk2k9m0l3i56o4lluj1tj8qbfb2g_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cdg6eor4cph2bs "FIGHT BACK") [FIGHT BACK](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zivs2k2ed2o8ah04i8uaqr3ni1nr868qcl5h1hd8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cdg6eor4cph2bs)
---

name: Team Collier
subject: Re: fixing the damn grid
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collier Committee
body:
This year, Texans froze because the Texas Railroad Commission didn’t do its job. |
#
---
Here's the truth, folks: It was the Railroad Commission of Texas’ job to make sure companies weatherized, and they failed to do so. Then, Texans froze, Texans died, and corporations enabled by the Texas GOP got rich. Now, Republicans at the RRC just got approval to raise Texans’ gas bills _$3.4 billion_ over the next few decades — money that will go to the same companies that charged astronomically high prices during February’s blackout and freeze. And Dan Patrick? Well, he got record donations from those very natural gas companies. And if he’s taking their money, he’s not holding them accountable. Look, Texas will not fix the damn grid until we have elected leaders that put people first, not profit. **That’s why Mike has pledged that he will not take a single penny from corporate PACs, not as a candidate and not as a Lieutenant Governor. ** And as the only energy expert in this race, Mike understands better than anyone that we need to finally invest in our critical infrastructure and redesign our grid to serve Texas families, not massive corporations. [**Texans deserve leaders who will fight for them — not corporations. clean_body: This year, Texans froze because the Texas Railroad Commission didn’t do its job. | Here's the truth, folks: It was the Railroad Commission of Texas’ job to make sure companies weatherized, and they failed to do so. Then, Texans froze, Texans died, and corporations enabled by the Texas GOP got rich. Now, Republicans at the RRC just got approval to raise Texans’ gas bills $3.4 billion over the next few decades — money that will go to the same companies that charged astronomically high prices during February’s blackout and freeze. And Dan Patrick? Well, he got record donations from those very natural gas companies. And if he’s taking their money, he’s not holding them accountable. Look, Texas will not fix the damn grid until we have elected leaders that put people first, not profit. That’s why Mike has pledged that he will not take a single penny from corporate PACs, not as a candidate and not as a Lieutenant Governor. And as the only energy expert in this race, Mike understands better than anyone that we need to finally invest in our critical infrastructure and redesign our grid to serve Texas families, not massive corporations. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you for fighting alongside us, Team Collier The Collier Committee P.O. Box 14648 Humble, TX 77347 United States | | Paid for by the Collier Committee

name: Rep. Haley Stevens
subject: Abby said I could email you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
We have the chance to elect the youngest woman ever to the U.S. Senate, Abby Finkenauer.
| | |
---
Peter, before I flipped this battleground seat in 2018, Michigan’s 11th District hadn’t elected a Democrat to serve a full term since the moon landing. And no woman, regardless of party, had ever won here.
Powered by grassroots supporters, my team and I made history. In 2020, I became the first Democrat to win re-election in this swing district in nearly 100 years. And in 2022, we have the chance to elect the youngest woman ever to the U.S. Senate, Abby Finkenauer.
**[Will you pitch in $5, or whatever you can, to help Abby and I make history and to hold and expand the Democratic House and Senate majorities?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38903572/317531138/1521117942?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk404-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNWVkYzg2OS1jNzRiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4gfkAm59wrn4ISSn-YwzOQqQvzEJZo78ROrFYrUIvLs=)**
When Abby and I ran to flip Trump districts blue in 2018, we knew it wouldn’t be easy.

But the American people deserve representatives who do more than just say they fight for us -- we deserve representatives who actually know how to do so.

As co-president of the historically diverse class of 2018, I saw firsthand the progress Abby made. Together, with our Democratic House majority, we’ve helped pass a record-breaking number of bills to expand affordable health care, protect our environment, invest in working families and so much more.
Now, as we emerge from another economic crisis, Abby and I are ready to meet this moment once again.
**[That's why I'm asking you to donate $5 or more now to our campaigns to help defeat our Republican opponents and to hold and expand the Democratic House and Senate majorities.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38903573/317531139/1521117942?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk404-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNWVkYzg2OS1jNzRiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4gfkAm59wrn4ISSn-YwzOQqQvzEJZo78ROrFYrUIvLs=)**
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38903574/317531140/1521117942?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk404-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNWVkYzg2OS1jNzRiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4gfkAm59wrn4ISSn-YwzOQqQvzEJZo78ROrFYrUIvLs=)

Yours truly,

Haley Stevens
Representative of MI-11

body:
I can win in Florida – but without you, friend, I cannot compete with GOP millions tipping the scales.
| | |
---
Friend, I'm 2 points behind Marco Rubio in the polls, and experts say this race will come down to who has the resources to compete.

**That's why this is so concerning: Florida can decide Senate control, and I'm currently $11,424 short of my midnight fundraising goal. ****So my team sent me your updated supporter record:**
| | Supporter: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Suggested contribution: $5
Today's donation: **PENDING**
---
| | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38903553/317531062/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1761-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOGEzOWIxMy1jNzRiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wreJ0xC7HUTLasg7_B4AbnG8joCVcxDT3oWpqDth1lw=)
---
Donations from your state: 68% to goal
**Deadline: 11:59 p.m.**
---
This race is about more than just my unlikely story of opportunity – it's about a meaningful movement for Floridians and the country, it's about defending the Senate. Mitch McConnell only needs one seat to flip a 50-50 Senate – and we can't let Florida be the seat securing him Senate control.

We can win this – CNN is calling this seat a top pickup opportunity – but we have a steep hill to climb. The GOP is pouring more than $10 MILLION into organizing Florida to register a groundbreaking number of Republican voters _._

**Republicans are working in overdrive to make sure no Democrat can flip Florida ever again, friend. This is our moment: It has never been more important to build the infrastructure to fight back, and we need to make early investments. We can't do that if we miss this goal. **
I know this people-powered movement is strong enough to defeat Marco Rubio and the GOP, but we need to raise another $50,000 RIGHT NOW to register more Democratic voters and flip Florida blue**. Please, friend, I'm counting on you to help me reach this goal:**

**[Friend, rush $5 right now to help me close our fundraising gap before midnight tonight, pull ahead of Marco Rubio in the polls and defend our Democratic Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38903555/317531064/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1761-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOGEzOWIxMy1jNzRiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wreJ0xC7HUTLasg7_B4AbnG8joCVcxDT3oWpqDth1lw=)**

Val Demings

body:
We need your help to turn things around
#

Friends —
We're writing to ask if you can make a $3 contribution today to Malcolm Kenyatta's campaign for U.S. Senate in Pennsylvania.
If that's all you need to hear, we're going to be tracking donations at this link:
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mk_em_q42021](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38903724/317532064/-360183459?refcode2=760ed3f4-c74b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211122-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjBlZDNmNC1jNzRiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HjF-bfGCfya5gzx7-vzXvvzf4WpxS74FyQNhU3MussM=)
If not, let us explain why this request is so important.
For campaigns that rely on support from grassroots donors, November is always a difficult fundraising month. It happens year after year.
It happened to Malcolm in his past elections, too.
This is a problem because most of Malcolm's opponents aren't relying on individual donations from real working folks.
They just need one or two big checks from their own bank accounts or wealthy donors. It's easy for them.
But that's not the kind of campaign we're running, so we cannot afford to fall behind.
**That's why we need your help today. Our fundraising this week is off to a slow start, and we need your help to turn things around.**
[Can you PLEASE make a $3 contribution to Malcolm Kenyatta's campaign today? We're tracking donations closely, so please chip in what you can today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38903725/317532065/-360183459?refcode2=760ed3f4-c74b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&refcode=em211122-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjBlZDNmNC1jNzRiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HjF-bfGCfya5gzx7-vzXvvzf4WpxS74FyQNhU3MussM=)

name: Catherine Cortez Masto
subject: The first
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
When I was growing up, I never could have imagined I’d become the first Latina ever elected to the Senate. It was only possible thanks to grassroots supporters like you.
#
When I was growing up, I never could have imagined I’d become the first Latina ever elected to the Senate. It was only possible thanks to grassroots supporters like you, Peter
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38904199/317534152/-1558147114?refcode=pm_em_211122_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDdmNWJmZC1jYTRiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KYMkXgVDruz1T0lHSiq6atb2Hg0O-NXeQ6GAHU2m97M=).
My parents taught me that I could accomplish _anything_ with hard work, honesty, and respect for others. I took that lesson and dedicated my life to public service.
They motivated me every day, and their lessons pushed my sister and I to be the first in our family to graduate college. Then I got to work defending my community.
I served two terms as Nevada’s Attorney General and then I became the first Latina and first woman from Nevada ever elected to the U.S. Senate. I won by just two points, narrowly overcoming $50 million spent by Mitch McConnell and his allies to defeat me.
Now new polling shows me 2 points _behind_ my Trump-endorsed opponent, and CNN is calling me one of the most vulnerable Senators in the country. My race has officially been downgraded from ‘Leans Democratic’ to ‘Toss-Up,’ and I’m about to fall short of my critical midnight goal.
**[Please Peter, will you rush a $5 donation right now to split between my campaign and Patty Murray to help me defeat Donald Trump’s endorsed candidate and defend our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38904200/317534153/-1558147114?refcode=pm_em_211122_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDdmNWJmZC1jYTRiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KYMkXgVDruz1T0lHSiq6atb2Hg0O-NXeQ6GAHU2m97M=)**
Mitch McConnell is only one seat away from retaking control of the Senate, which means we have zero room for error. I’m counting on your immediate support to close the polling gap by hitting this critical goal before my midnight deadline.
_¡La lucha sigue!_ The fight continues!
Catherine Cortez Masto
** **
** **

body:

Friends, **[We’re building a people-powered campaign driven by the interests of people like you, and Wes wants to hear from you along the way: will you take a minute to complete our November issues survey?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38904506/317537570/1625325649?refcode=fl_email_su_20211122survey_tw_30da_1b_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTAzNTRjMi1jZTRiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Obpv0wK1OsS3l3YEqZLQzNZMds4vAt7MH_hKzGuLfF8=&emci=390354c2-ce4b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=3a0354c2-ce4b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=24635485)** Unlike many who run for office, Wes knows what it's like to struggle. As a child, he watched his father die from a treatable virus just hours after he was sent home from the hospital. His mom, left widowed, raised Wes and his sisters with help from her parents. Growing up, Wes faced his share of challenges, and his life could have gone a different way. But his family instilled strong values in him. He joined the Army, became a captain in the 82nd Airborne Division, and led soldiers into combat in Afghanistan. He earned a Rhodes Scholarship, served in the White House, and created a successful small business in Baltimore to help kids go to college. And he went on to become CEO of one of the country’s largest organizations fighting to end poverty. **Now, Wes is running for governor, because he believes no matter what road you start down, you deserve a path to success. And he wants to hear from you directly as we continue to build this campaign for the people of Maryland.** **[Take a minute to share your thoughts and priorities with Wes by taking our November survey today>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38904507/317537588/1625325649?refcode=fl_email_su_20211122survey_tw_30da_1b_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTAzNTRjMi1jZTRiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Obpv0wK1OsS3l3YEqZLQzNZMds4vAt7MH_hKzGuLfF8=&emci=390354c2-ce4b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=3a0354c2-ce4b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=24635485)** **** | [TAKE OUR SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38904509/317537641/1625325649?refcode=fl_email_su_20211122survey_tw_30da_1b_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTAzNTRjMi1jZTRiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Obpv0wK1OsS3l3YEqZLQzNZMds4vAt7MH_hKzGuLfF8=&emci=390354c2-ce4b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=3a0354c2-ce4b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=24635485)

Wes looks forward to reading your responses and putting your best interests first as he works to fight for you as Maryland’s next governor.
— Team Wes

| Wes Moore is a combat veteran, a former small business owner, and the former CEO of a leading non-profit. Wes believes no matter where you start in life, you deserve an equal opportunity to succeed. He’s running to become Governor of Maryland and flip this state blue for the first time in 8 years. And we need your help to do it.

name: Seth Magaziner
subject: Standing against Citizens United to Keep Dark Money Out of Rhode Island
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SETH MAGAZINER FOR GOVERNOR
body:
**No takers so far after Magaziner suggests Dems sign a 'People's Pledge'**

"Democratic gubernatorial candidate Seth Magaziner on Wednesday suggested he and his rivals should adopt a "People's Pledge" to keep outside money out of their primary race, but so far none of his opponents have backed the idea."
---
Peter,

Last week, I called on my opponents in the Democratic primary to sign a People's Pledge to keep dark money out of Rhode Island.

Since the disastrous _Citizens United_ decision in 2010, dark money groups have been able to spend unlimited amounts of money to influence our elections. Unlimited dark money and misinformation threatens our democracy, and as candidates, we have the power to do something about it.

A People's Pledge is an idea that started in the United States Senate race between Elizabeth Warren and Scott Brown and was effective in keeping dark money out of that race. The way it works is that all the candidates in a race agree that if an outside group spends money that benefits them or attacks their opponent, that candidate will donate the same amount of money to charity. The People's Pledge has worked in other races too, including here in RI in the 2014 race for Governor.

**If we're going to move Rhode Island forward, we need our public officials to prove they're ready to get to work for Rhode Islanders and no one else.**

That's why I'm asking all of my opponents to sign a People's Pledge to stand against _Citizens United_ and unlimited outside spending, not just with words but with actions.

[**Add your name to join me in calling on all of the candidates in Rhode Island's race for Governor to commit to the People's Pledge to keep dark money out of Rhode Island politics.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38904749/317538523/-390254990?ms=em21_211122_SM_adv_gq_act___pldge_ettx&refcode=em21_211122_SM_adv_gq_act___pldge_ettx&source=em21_211122_SM_adv_gq_act___pldge_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211122_SM_adv_gq_act___pldge_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=6ngIt%2BgyJN1fGCdZXvPHowgARhNyEK7wY5P7hBsmUH92cO58CFUTQtWdOXKNb4jCHXPQ87JtQ%2BlPhP7%2BiATacggRNzeHwKpmlLOf9nfycnikBQYaXdKgfoC0Y0H0MVqxkhBicoiXqrsedd%2FSTpJ%2BYWLwvz9QdNh33st9wr5qYwA%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YjAzNTRjMi1jZTRiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NgAlBsDpo4jMB0DKW1pPw7xi2yu-BbtOv-LPe-2uq3s=&emci=8f0067d7-c04b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=4b0354c2-ce4b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=15384964)

clean_body: No takers so far after Magaziner suggests Dems sign a 'People's Pledge' "Democratic gubernatorial candidate Seth Magaziner on Wednesday suggested he and his rivals should adopt a "People's Pledge" to keep outside money out of their primary race, but so far none of his opponents have backed the idea." Peter, Last week, I called on my opponents in the Democratic primary to sign a People's Pledge to keep dark money out of Rhode Island. Since the disastrous Citizens United decision in 2010, dark money groups have been able to spend unlimited amounts of money to influence our elections. Unlimited dark money and misinformation threatens our democracy, and as candidates, we have the power to do something about it. A People's Pledge is an idea that started in the United States Senate race between Elizabeth Warren and Scott Brown and was effective in keeping dark money out of that race. The way it works is that all the candidates in a race agree that if an outside group spends money that benefits them or attacks their opponent, that candidate will donate the same amount of money to charity. The People's Pledge has worked in other races too, including here in RI in the 2014 race for Governor. If we're going to move Rhode Island forward, we need our public officials to prove they're ready to get to work for Rhode Islanders and no one else. That's why I'm asking all of my opponents to sign a People's Pledge to stand against Citizens United and unlimited outside spending, not just with words but with actions. Thank you, Seth = | | ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY SETH MAGAZINER FOR GOVERNOR VICTORIA ALMEIDA, TREASURER Seth Magaziner for Governor Victoria Almeida, Treasurer PO Box 303 Providence, RI 02901 United States

body:
This is a really bad wake-up call.
#
This is a _really_ bad wake-up call, team –
**My must-win Senate race has officially been downgraded from ‘Leans Democrat’ to ‘TOSS-UP’. **
With Senate control hinging on Nevada, this downgrade is the most alarming development in our fight to defend the Senate so far. **[Can you rush $5 to split between my campaign and Jacky Rosen before my critical fundraising deadline tonight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38904856/317539168/288875952?refcode=jr_em_nd_211122_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjI0NzRlOS1jZTRiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tTlHnic4W6qYh95jf9vuN1JLABa9WyTsst7c1cyP7N0=)**
CNN is calling me one of the most vulnerable senators in the entire country -- and the GOP is already outspending me to flip this seat and the Senate red. They've poured more than $2 million into attack ads to defeat me, and if this downgrade is any indication, their efforts are working.
Mitch McConnell only needs one seat to flip the Senate, and a new poll already shows me trailing my Trump-endorsed opponent by 2 points. **I'm being massively outspent and I’m in danger of losing. I cannot afford to miss my midnight fundraising goal if we want to win in Nevada and defend the Senate.**
But as of today, I'm falling $5,204 short of my critical goal. Missing goals at this point in the race could force us to make difficult decisions and cut back critical investments, which just can't happen when our race could determine the Senate majority. I don't have anywhere else to turn, so I'm coming to you personally with this urgent request:
**[Please, will you rush $5 or more now to split between my campaign and Jacky Rosen to help defend our Democratic Senate majority? Every dollar counts in a race this close.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38904858/317539170/288875952?refcode=jr_em_nd_211122_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=Henderson&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjI0NzRlOS1jZTRiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tTlHnic4W6qYh95jf9vuN1JLABa9WyTsst7c1cyP7N0=)**
Thank you so much for being on my team.
_¡La lucha sigue!_ The fight continues!
Catherine Cortez Masto

| | This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zdsrc751ph3hnqspoim8009e8f0oc8pqn1m9g5mo_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cdi64oj3cjh2bs)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that support. That’s why you have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Survey on Socialism. With your response, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans—views that we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. Every month, Hillsdale College is reaching millions of Americans with educational outreach. Your response to this National Survey on Socialism is essential in helping us form the most effective strategy in fighting for the future of our country. So please give your views on the political, media, and cultural forces that are promoting socialism in our country today, by completing this National Survey on Socialism: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2021-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zan19k6bcbnvnbu2a8hseqrs96vdnapbnl33eeu8_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cdi64oj3cjh2bs)** There is no doubt in my mind that, especially among younger Americans, socialism is increasingly attractive—and that this threatens the future of American liberty. As Winston Churchill noted, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” And education is the surest way to defeat it. If you agree, please stand with Hillsdale College as we promote intelligent patriotism and defend liberty through education. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Socialism today. | [**Take the Survey**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z4mv9s0c8291p958pks1sti2qhke11neep7rujq0_rp22sh2s8i66pj7cdi64oj3cjh2bs)
---
Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
