name: =?utf-8?Q?Charles=20Evans?=
subject: Big Announcement!
body:
I'm writing with exciting news.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/charlesevansforcongress2022/big-announcement-8629969?e=5c88a5190b)

**
------------------------------------------------------------

Hi Friends,

I want to personally reach out and let you know that I have announced I’m running for Congress in the newly drawn 4th Congressional District, which includes Cumberland, Harnett, Johnston, Sampson, and Wayne Counties.

Now that we have an official district to run in, I want to invite you to join our campaign. It’s going to take all of us to win this new seat in 2022! Can I count on your support of $10 today so, together, we can win? (https://charlesevansforcongress2022.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ba7b19ef75bed8e6ab352c090&id=80c6c9a6fa&e=5c88a5190b)

During the past couple of weeks, I have been talking with people around the district and one thing has been made clear consistently: Washington DC is not working for us. I want to go to Congress and tackle real issues that affect real people. My time on the Cape Fear Valley Hospital System Board of Trustees, in addition to my personal experiences, allow me to have a strong understanding of what people need when it comes to rising prescription costs, job insecurity and homelessness, substance abuse, and mental health issues.

With candidate filing now only three weeks away, we need to get ready today! I hope I can count on your support so we can win the new 4th Congressional District. (https://charlesevansforcongress2022.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ba7b19ef75bed8e6ab352c090&id=5625c8843a&e=5c88a5190b)

Thank you for everything and have a blessed day,

Charles

Donate (https://charlesevansforcongress2022.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ba7b19ef75bed8e6ab352c090&id=2df1e00ca1&e=5c88a5190b)

============================================================

Charles is all about second chances and committed to helping those who are less fortunate. He experienced homelessness and battled with addiction and credits his faith for overcoming both. He is the Executive Director of Life Worth Living - Project Fresh Start and involved with various civic and professional associations including serving as a member of the Cape Fear Valley Hospital System Board of Trustees, American Legion Post 202, Men’s Democratic Club, and Order of the Elks. Charles was first elected to the Cumberland County Board of Commissioners as an at-large representative in 2010 - his current term expires in 2022. He served two terms on the Fayetteville City Council from 2005-2009.

You can learn more at ** www.charlesevansforcongress2022.com (https://charlesevansforcongress2022.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ba7b19ef75bed8e6ab352c090&id=b479da76c2&e=5c88a5190b)

Our mailing address is:
Evans for Congress | PO Box 52 | Fayetteville, NC 28302
Contact us at: ** info@charlesevansforcongress2022.com (mailto:info@charlesevansforcongress2022.com)

You can change how you receive these emails: ** update your preferences (https://charlesevansforcongress2022.us5.list-manage.com/profile?u=ba7b19ef75bed8e6ab352c090&id=584eded014&e=5c88a5190b&c=2f96b72874)
or ** unsubscribe from this list (https://charlesevansforcongress2022.us5.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=ba7b19ef75bed8e6ab352c090&id=584eded014&e=5c88a5190b&c=2f96b72874)

body:
The price tag to secure Wisconsin’s elections.
| Friend,
---
I just received the first bill for our lawsuit...
---
The costs of suing the Wisconsin Elections Commission to ensure future elections are free and fair are significant -- nearly $50,000! But like you, I believe no price tag is too high when it comes to protecting the integrity of our elections.
---
_Now more than ever, I’m counting on your sustained support to help us cover the** _$50,000 legal bill_** we’ve incurred for our ensuing legal battle against the Elections Commission. _

clean_body: The price tag to secure Wisconsin’s elections. | Friend, I just received the first bill for our lawsuit... The costs of suing the Wisconsin Elections Commission to ensure future elections are free and fair are significant -- nearly $50,000! But like you, I believe no price tag is too high when it comes to protecting the integrity of our elections. Now more than ever, I’m counting on your sustained support to help us cover the $50,000 legal bill we’ve incurred for our ensuing legal battle against the Elections Commission. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch Former Lieutenant Governor of Wisconsin Republican Candidate for Governor \- - - - Forwarded Message - - - - From: Rebecca Kleefisch Date: Mon, Nov 15, 2021 Subject: BREAKING: LAWSUIT To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, After a non-partisan audit of the Wisconsin Elections Commission (WEC) identified numerous instances of the Commission issuing unlawful guidance on the 2020 election, I knew we couldn’t wait to act. That’s why I’m SUING the WEC to ensure our elections are FREE and FAIR with less than 1 year to go until Election Day. But I’m counting on our grassroots supporters like YOU to help me marshal the resources to win this fight in the courts. If we don’t secure Wisconsin’s elections ahead of this MUST-WIN governor’s race, 2022 will be nothing more than a repeat of 2020. We cannot wait until the eve of next year’s election to address the WEC’s failure and willful neglect of the law. Which is exactly why I’m asking the state Supreme court to immediately SUSPEND the unlawful guidance the WEC issued on the 2020 election. Our lawsuit is focusing on 3 key areas where the WEC failed to follow the law in its guidance: 1\. Allowing municipalities to establish unattended absentee ballot drop boxes 2\. Banning special voting deputies from long term care facilities 3\. Relocating and closing polling places on the eve of an election There’s too much at stake for us to lose this battle in the courts, Friend. Our freedom, our way of life, and the future of our great nation all depend on free and fair elections -- elections where every voter can trust the process and the result. Now more than ever, I need you fighting by my side to ensure our elections are free and fair. Thank you, Rebecca Kleefisch Former Lieutenant Governor of Wisconsin Republican Candidate for Governor Paid for by People for Rebecca. PO Box 628284, Middleton, WI 53562

| Peter,
---
| Microsoft Network (MSN) may have just put out the most blatant and desperate attack against me yet...
In an attempt to smear my name and fuel the radical left's conspiracy theories, MSN used a leftwing troll account with just 74 followers as a source for an article about me. The most shocking part is that they used a quote from this "source" in their headline!
As you're probably aware, I am under constant attack by the mainstream media. They have tried just about everything they can to take me down - CNN's technical director even admitted on camera that their network promotes propaganda against me because I am a "problem for the Democrat party." So, this potential libel by MSN is not going to slow me down.
[I am going on offense against the Fake News Media - and I am not afraid to do it alone. They are the enemy of the people, and I am happy to stand in their way as they try to destroy you next.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cLbRJBULcMZu_1cgeh5bd_gfky0mbgSiNuHyUm1NhFyTDHj-3Sz92CcVT0xUaNvUwsDDxG5h-RgCTv_rll1SwtvNOauYOzAOFleJVCDE9tV6pZkVnfSnjI7wnUGLtFw4DD5OMgKstsFml7yQ9h_hTP13b3YLgBCKTACJ2JhuqepUs5h26sinUg==&c=4e6FK-EsXP-O0Bu6zNc6ri-R1vGx9Zmsls3CC0Q8jyIDMASdizKfaA==&ch=8mAyvqjeWk119lf8vyuCUXhWmrWXNsUjwa88W87GG7KqCWYLc1D3og==)

clean_body: | | | | | | == | Peter, | Microsoft Network (MSN) may have just put out the most blatant and desperate attack against me yet... In an attempt to smear my name and fuel the radical left's conspiracy theories, MSN used a leftwing troll account with just 74 followers as a source for an article about me. The most shocking part is that they used a quote from this "source" in their headline! As you're probably aware, I am under constant attack by the mainstream media. They have tried just about everything they can to take me down - CNN's technical director even admitted on camera that their network promotes propaganda against me because I am a "problem for the Democrat party." So, this potential libel by MSN is not going to slow me down. == | | | == | Seriously, just take a look at this: | == | The mainstream media despises me, much like the rest of the Swamp, corporate lobbyists, over-soyed California liberals, and the Big Tech oligarchs. I am hated in just about every circle of Washington D.C., but that just means that I am the one fighting for change. If you're with me, I'd like to know you're joining the fight. body:
|
| | | Conservatives are preparing for battle, and right now, **we need you with us more than ever before, Patriot. **

The Midterm Election results will define the future we leave behind for our children and grandchildren. We cannot hesitate. The time to strike is now. **[Are you with us?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58837631:Jxcm_52Ny:m:1:3299561967:9DD3EB51F065CFBA98EF79AB7C628D82:r "Are you with us?")**

We refuse to lie to you, and we won't sugarcoat it for you either. The Radical Left is energized, and they're determined to destroy every lasting legacy President Trump left on this great nation.

**[That's why I'm asking you to take a stand right now with President Trump and House Conservatives. If you commit to starting the RED WAVE by 11:59 PM, we will match your contribution by 850%!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58837631:Jxcm_52Ny:m:1:3299561967:9DD3EB51F065CFBA98EF79AB7C628D82:r "That’s

And do you know who else thinks they’re wrong? Donald Trump, of all people! He recently advised Gov. DeSantis: **“Don’t underestimate Charlie Crist.”** For once, Trump is right!

Friend, it's obvious that Arizona deserves better than the failed leadership of Republicans like Doug Ducey and Kari Lake. We need a governor who will focus on what Arizonans truly need – from voting rights to health care to education. We need restoration of our state's potential. We need a leader we can believe in.
**Marco Lopez (D) is that leader. He's an Obama administration alum, a voting rights champion and a small business owner. And now, he's running for governor with the experience we need to flip Arizona blue and defend our democracy.**
But _POLITICO_ called his race the _most_ competitive open-seat race in the country – so he can't win without powerful grassroots support behind him. **That's why we set a goal of having 5,000 more people (like YOU!) personally endorse Marco's campaign to flip Arizona blue. We've heard from so many people already, but we still need you to join them.[With Arizona's future on the line, friend, will you join this growing movement by adding your name to endorse Marco Lopez for governor?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38911615/317580547/-89788242?code=jtk307-su-nd&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Flopez-2021-nov-strategy%3Fcode%3Djtk307-su-nd&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTNmODIzMS1mNTRiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iGaqb9Fwlp4wh9GdkY5S-RqMMKYuYvcXG3AruL4WAx8=&emci=d9895aa2-cb4b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=9a3f8231-f54b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=6085109)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38911616/317580548/-89788242?code=jtk307-su-nd&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Flopez-2021-nov-strategy%3Fcode%3Djtk307-su-nd&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTNmODIzMS1mNTRiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iGaqb9Fwlp4wh9GdkY5S-RqMMKYuYvcXG3AruL4WAx8=&emci=d9895aa2-cb4b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=9a3f8231-f54b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=6085109)
The Arizona GOP has made it clear that they'll leave no stone unturned – and no conspiracy theory un-invoked – in their desperate attempt to keep Arizona red. They've invited QAnon conspiracy theorists like Marjorie Taylor Greene to challenge our election, let Donald Trump rile up his base at a rally and suggested they would copy the worst of other states' ultra-conservative agendas to strip us of our rights.
Marco is running to fight for _all_ people – but he needs our help to win before he can defeat this rampant extremism. **Experts from Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight to the Cook Political Report agree we CAN win this race, but only if we win it together. So with so much at stake, we have to ask:**
**[Will you be one of the 5,000 more people we need to personally endorse Marco, before our midnight deadline, to help him flip Arizona blue and defeat GOP extremism?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38911617/317580549/-89788242?code=jtk307-su-nd&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Flopez-2021-nov-strategy%3Fcode%3Djtk307-su-nd&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTNmODIzMS1mNTRiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iGaqb9Fwlp4wh9GdkY5S-RqMMKYuYvcXG3AruL4WAx8=&emci=d9895aa2-cb4b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=9a3f8231-f54b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=6085109)**
Thank you,

Team Lopez
* * *
**Please read on for a personal message from Democrat Marco Lopez:**
Friend, I’m so grateful you’re part of our people-powered movement to flip Arizona blue. But I have to be honest: I’m counting on your help now more than ever. I’m a proud Democrat, former border city mayor and Obama administration alum – and I’m running for governor to build a state that works for all our people. But failed GOP politicians like Kelli Ward and Doug Ducey are spreading delusional conspiracy theories and putting Donald Trump’s interests ahead of what’s best for our state. Enough is enough. But with Arizona slated to be the nation's TOP battleground in 2022, Republicans are gearing up to spend MILLIONS to keep the governorship red, so we’ll only win this race with overwhelming grassroots support. If you’re with me, [please chip in to power our fight forward.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38911618/317580550/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&code=jtk307-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YTNmODIzMS1mNTRiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iGaqb9Fwlp4wh9GdkY5S-RqMMKYuYvcXG3AruL4WAx8=) Thank you so much.

**☞ GA Senate Ratings Change ☜
Lean Democratic -> Toss-Up**
Peter,

BIG NEWS! The ratings changes are in.

Just weeks after we launched our campaign in Georgia for the U.S. Senate, political pundits are now rating the race as a "Toss-up," which is movement in our direction from the previous rating of "Leans Democratic."

If you've read anything about the outcome of the recent elections in Virginia and New Jersey, then you understand why Republicans are in a strong position to flip the Senate next year if we have the resources to communicate our message.

In fact, Gov.-elect Glenn Youngkin's success in Virginia (which had been trending Democratic in recent years) was so strong that it reverberated across the country and set off "Alarm Bells" with some of the more liberal election forecasters.

Take a look for yourself:

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58845377:JIhh_52jN:m:1:3253819041:30167F5C206D9BEC440C4D10D1771FE2:r)
**I think after the recent election results in Virginia, every election prognosticator in the country realizes that our Senate race in Georgia is a toss-up.**

While I'm not a career politician, it's clear as day that national Democrats are going to see this ratings change as a signal they need to pour as much money as humanly possible into this race to keep this Senate seat in their column.

Therefore, we _must_ increase our own fundraising efforts to beat them. If you can make an investment in this critical toss-up race, please know there is no better time than today. **[This is a race in which every SINGLE DOLLAR is going to count. subject: We passed the Build Back Better Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony Cárdenas For Congress P
body:
| Peter,

I wanted to let you know that last week House Democrats passed the Build Back Better Act, a once-in-a-generation bill that invests in working-class families now and builds a better future for Americans to come.

This bill will strengthen long-term economic growth, create jobs, and keep more money in working families’ pockets.

**This amazing piece of legislation _would not_ have been possible without our Democratic House majority.**

In spite of all the good it does, not a single Republican voted to pass it. Top Republicans like Kevin McCarthy desperately tried to kill this bill on the House floor.

Fellow American,

In August the radical left began talking about mandating vaccines for individuals working in the United States Capitol, the military, and beyond. **Now, President Biden wants to "compel" the private sector to mandate vaccinations or face fines up to $14,000 PER VIOLATION!**

**Chances are that if you’re reading this email today you already think that the heavy hand of the federal government plays too large a role in your everyday life**. And we’d agree with you. You may not be the target of the first round of vaccine mandates, but eventually the long arm of government will come for those who aren’t vaccinated, and that isn’t their role.

**We’ve lived through 19 months of a pandemic that both ravaged our economy and put us on a path to financial ruin**. Americans have suffered enough from COVID-19 restrictions, mask mandates, and now potential forced vaccinations.

**[What we want to know from you is if you agree or not. Peter, this just in from a brand new poll in Arizona: | _"When asked who they would prefer as a U.S. Senator given the options of Sinema, a Republican, and a Democrat other than Sinema, only 26% of Arizona Democrats said that they would prefer Sinema,**while another 72% chose a Democrat other than Kyrsten Sinema."**_ — Arizona Public Opinion Pulse, Nov. 2021 __
---
Our movement is succeeding. Arizona Democrats know that they deserve better than Sinema. In fact, the polling also showed Sinema losing by over 20 points against each of three potential Democratic opponents:
**_Arizona Public Opinion Pulse, Nov. 2021_**
Sinema v Stanton: 25-47
Sinema v R Gallego: 24-47
Sinema v Hoffman: 24-44
The data continues to show what we've already known. **Arizonans are ready to meet the moment.** We're ready to vote for someone who has our best interests at heart — not someone who will abuse her power to curry favor with corporations and Republicans.
**[We're working with grassroots organizations on the ground, building a foundation to oust Kyrsten Sinema from office. clean_body: | | Hi friends, Amid the joyful holiday festivities, our team is working as hard as we can to keep you up-to-date with the most important information from the campaign trail. Follow Doug on , , and to stay informed and if you're able, consider making a to support our campaign. If you missed anything over the past week, check out our ICYMI recap below! Thank you, Jay Satterfield In Case You Missed It Last week, Doug spoke about his record and bold agenda for Maryland with Scott Ewart as part of the Scott E's Blog candidate interview series. | Then, in a forum with Maryland Family Network, Doug emphasized the importance of ensuring no Marylander has to choose between their family's health and a paycheck and vowed to advocate aggressively for the General Assembly to pass a paid family leave bill. | Next, Doug participated in a gubernatorial forum hosted by St. Ignatius Church in Baltimore. It was a fantastic opportunity for him to speak about the most important issues facing our state, while highlighting St. Ignatius's mission and commitment to social justice. Shout out to Father Jim! | | | Finally, at a Democratic Attorneys General Association Conference, Doug ran into close friend, supporter, and thorn in the Trump Administration's side, Washington State Attorney General Bob Ferguson. | By Authority: Friends of Doug Gansler, Terry Denney, Treasurer; Ana Sol Gutierrez, Chair. Friends of Doug Gansler P.O. Box 31102 Bethesda, MD 20824 United States | | Sent via . name: Laura Loomer
subject: Catching a Killer!
body:
Forty people, including over 23 children were injured as an SUV plowed through a Christmas parade in Waukesha, Wisconsin last night.
| | | | [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/saDSiOonni0j892BC7bhThtg/uDjFODK9E763bseuV6emlpcg) | Patriot,

[](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/saDSiOonni0j892BC7bhThtg/uDjFODK9E763bseuV6emlpcg) Forty people, including over 23 children were injured as an SUV plowed through a Christmas parade in Waukesha, Wisconsin last night.

At least five people were killed, including small children and two elderly members of the “Dancing Grannies” group who were participating in the parade.

Loomered.com was the first media company to identify Darrell Brooks as the killer last night while the mainstream media waited until this morning to release his identity, along with a carefully crafted motive that is an absolute lie.

Last night, police questioned Brooks for the murders and took him into custody.

Brooks is a BLACK SUPREMECIST who had been released from jail on bond three days ago – the same exact day that Kyle Rittenhouse was acquitted.

Someone paid Brook’s $1,000 bond to have him released.

This was a deliberate, and racist attack on white Americans.

Another piece of information we broke last night is the fact that Brooks is a registered sex offender and pedophile with a life-long rap sheet of violence.

Brooks was also a wannabe rap artist, and that’s how we ultimately identified him. His red SUV was in the background of one of his music videos with the ironic caption, “all gas, no brakes.”

| | Peter,
---
| Today I am honored to announce the endorsement of Cibola County Sheriff Tony Mace!

Mace has an incredible record of defending our 2nd Amendment Rights and protecting our communities from smuggling, trafficking, and violent crime. **He knows that the current leadership under MLG leaves New Mexicans behind in favor of a radical Democrat agenda. **

Together we will bring a strong Conservative message that New Mexicans will not be left behind by the corrupt Democrat leadership **any longer.**

| [ ](https://blockfornewmexico.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05a2cec40e7a4755c4df899c3&id=126586a1a8&e=102b599530)
---
| Open borders, shutting down our energy sector, and providing payments to illegal immigrants over our own citizens needs to end NOW!

Donate today to help my campaign stand up to the crony money that fuels MLG’s radical Democrat agenda:
---
| [📣 NEW MEXICANS DESERVE BETTER THAN MLG](https://blockfornewmexico.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=05a2cec40e7a4755c4df899c3&id=199c7860d0&e=102b599530 "📣 NEW MEXICANS DESERVE BETTER THAN MLG")

| Yours in liberty,

**_Jay Block_**
Candidate for Governor
Lt Col (Ret), USAF

name: Team Schrier
subject: Historic investment in middle class families
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
ICYMI: Kim voted to pass the historic Build Back Better Act last week! **ICYMI: Kim voted to pass the historic Build Back Better Act last week!**

This legislation will invest in middle-class families by lowering prescription drug costs, extending the Child Tax Credit, combating climate change, and so much more. It also includes provisions championed by Kim to combat wildfires.

Kim is delivering on her promise to make progress for the families of Washington's 8th District, and we want to show her our gratitude for her hard work. **[Add your name right away to thank Kim and Democrats in Congress for passing the historic Build Back Better Act>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38912123/317594173/579964248?ms=em21_211122_BBB2_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&refcode=em21_211122_BBB2_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&source=em21_211122_BBB2_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211122_BBB2_adv_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=NF4d0Dx3lZXbFFFyVcE6PoPmghXkkdBhzweb205Si8XGatsA7RU%2BMGJjpsAddtTJxSwlEhLEpAdYaNWx32OJX16lDlzoBzDJZFeCBpqXUUzOlHCm4KWLjNVtDzfSfSstJ8kfAOX%2B%2BSfVtqUwcTNxbWJFFM8SqoLLJK%2Fwm4lCU9U%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZmFhZThlMC1mYzRiLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=G7puSGyVFZGvbXSA_76AWZFGePasp66W8Tds48wrg2M=&emci=b216b036-f14b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=4faae8e0-fc4b-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=15820338)**

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
Date: Fri, Nov 19, 2021
Subject: BREAKING: The House passed the Build Back Better Act!

| **BREAKING: "House passes Biden’s Build Back Better bill, sending measure with free preschool, climate initiatives to the Senate"
\-- _USA Today_ **
---
Team,

Earlier this week, Kim joined President Biden at the White House for the signing of the historic bipartisan Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act. This bill will make great progress for our nation by investing in our infrastructure, creating new jobs, and more -- but Kim isn't stopping there.

**This morning, Kim voted to pass the Build Back Better Act in the House. This is another critical piece of legislation that will:**

✅ Lower prescription drug costs;
✅ Expand access to free, high-quality Pre-K;
✅ Extend the Child Tax Credit;
✅ Provide paid family and medical leave;
✅ Invest in childcare and home health care;
✅ Cap ACA health insurance premiums;
✅ Address the urgent threat of climate change;
✅ Invest in forest management;
✅ And more!

As a mom and pediatrician, Kim knows this legislation is a historic investment in middle class families. The Build Back Better agenda is exactly what Kim promised to accomplish when she was first sent to Congress.

clean_body: ICYMI: Kim voted to pass the historic Build Back Better Act last week! ICYMI: Kim voted to pass the historic Build Back Better Act last week! This legislation will invest in middle-class families by lowering prescription drug costs, extending the Child Tax Credit, combating climate change, and so much more. It also includes provisions championed by Kim to combat wildfires. Kim is delivering on her promise to make progress for the families of Washington's 8th District, and we want to show her our gratitude for her hard work. \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Date: Fri, Nov 19, 2021 Subject: BREAKING: The House passed the Build Back Better Act! | BREAKING: "House passes Biden’s Build Back Better bill, sending measure with free preschool, climate initiatives to the Senate" \-- USA Today Team, Earlier this week, Kim joined President Biden at the White House for the signing of the historic bipartisan Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act. This bill will make great progress for our nation by investing in our infrastructure, creating new jobs, and more -- but Kim isn't stopping there. This morning, Kim voted to pass the Build Back Better Act in the House. This is another critical piece of legislation that will: ✅ Lower prescription drug costs; ✅ Expand access to free, high-quality Pre-K; ✅ Extend the Child Tax Credit; ✅ Provide paid family and medical leave; ✅ Invest in childcare and home health care; ✅ Cap ACA health insurance premiums; ✅ Address the urgent threat of climate change; ✅ Invest in forest management; ✅ And more! As a mom and pediatrician, Kim knows this legislation is a historic investment in middle class families. The Build Back Better agenda is exactly what Kim promised to accomplish when she was first sent to Congress. Thanks, Team Schrier National Republicans have named Rep. Kim Schrier's district a top target for the midterms, so we need your help to build another winning campaign. | | Dear ,
My name is Mark Finchem. I am the America-First, Trump-endorsed, election integrity patriot running for Secretary of State in Arizona.

**[I am writing you today](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=8ff8e3c623&e=44b8c466b0) because we cannot be lulled into a false sense of security because of our win in Virginia. If the results in New Jersey showed us anything, we know this.**

**The Democrats do not sleep. They are trying everything they can to undermine our elections while proud Patriots stay quiet.**

You can always tell this by what the media is doing. They are the propaganda arm of the Democrat party, the shadow puppets of the Radical Left.

**And the media attacks are escalating on myself, on my campaign, and on election integrity in general. They do this because they are scared of the progress we are making.**

Here are some of the attacks just in the last week:
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=b479cdd264&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| From _AZ Central:_

_He helped spread Trump’s discredited claims of election fraud from its earliest days and pressed repeatedly for a legislative hearing on irregularities cited by Giuliani. _

_With the ballot review in Maricopa County complete, Finchem called for expanded action. “We need to Audit Pima County,” he wrote on Twitter. He baselessly claimed 35,000 votes were “in question from multiple sources & I want answers.”_

_Trump rewarded Finchem’s loyalty with his coveted endorsement in a race that had scarcely started._

_“Mark was willing to say what few others had the courage to say,” Trump said in his announcement._
---
|
---
| Also from _AZ Central:_

_State Rep. Mark Finchem, R-Oro Valley, hosted the meeting, which Trump joined by phone. It seemed to bestow newfound importance on a man once ridiculed for wearing a “cowboy costume” at the Legislature._

_Finchem ... became one of the leading proponents of an “audit” of the election results. He pressed for a special legislative session to overturn the results and award the state’s electors to Trump. _

_As much as he wanted to, Finchem did not preside over an official legislative hearing. Bowers refused to authorize it despite Finchem’s repeated requests to hold one at the House of Representatives._
---
|
---
| And from _ABC News:_
_Retired TV news anchor Kari Lake, now a frontrunner in the GOP gubernatorial primary, has said over the course of her campaign that if she were governor last November, she would not have certified the election. State Rep. Mark Finchem, who was at the insurrection on Jan. 6 and defended the actions of those who stormed the Capitol, is now pursuing a run for the state's chief elections official and would have oversight over the state's elections._
Our opponents are spending inordinate amounts of time and money trying to attack me and election integrity. They are launching smear campaigns across countless media outlets on an almost daily basis.

**Folks, the media only does this when they are scared. _Let’s give them something to be scared of. [Let’s show them that Election Integrity Patriots have the momentum and WILL win in 2022!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=61590a6ea6&e=44b8c466b0)_**

We’re heading into the holidays and I know that you, like myself, are thinking of family and cheer this time of the year, counting our blessings, and thanking God for our many gifts.

**But make no mistake, now is not a time to get too comfortable. The Radical Left and those that stole the election from us still walk free from the due punishment they deserve. And they are busy planning how to steal the next elections.**

It is critical this does not happen. To do this, we need to spread the word of Election Integrity, apply pressure on Mark Brnovich to throw the perpetrators of Election Fraud in jail, and we need to Audit Pima County. [And we can only do this with your support.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=35c01d2286&e=44b8c466b0)

[Please make a generous donation today to help our campaign protect Arizona’s elections, America’s elections, and secure America’s future by protecting the sanctity of our elections!

Please donate as much as you can today!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=905e9f300e&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=73bb9c4ec1&e=44b8c466b0)
God Bless You,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=d45c3f9308&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

P.S. I am trying to Audit Pima County. If you support my efforts, [please contribute whatever you can by the end of this month](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=863976f852&e=44b8c466b0).

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737
[Add us to your address book](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=b03a259ab1) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=b03a259ab1).

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: Regardless of my opponent, this will be a hard-fought race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/3869?t=6&akid=946%2E878179%2EBubUtd) Folks -

In 2016, I won by only 1,017 votes, beating the incumbent Republican in one of the closest races in history.

**Regardless of who my opponent is in 2022, this will be a hard-fought race, and I'm not taking anything for granted.**

With our 50-50 Senate majority, Republicans only have to flip one seat to retake control, and Mitch McConnell is all in on New Hampshire. If I lose, Democrats will lose our slim majority -- affecting everything from health care protections to the fate of _Roe v. Wade._

Make no mistake, no matter who emerges as the Republican nominee, this will still be one of the most competitive Senate races in the country. Winning in a swing state like New Hampshire isn’t easy, and it isn’t cheap. Mitch McConnell and his dark money allies are already flooding the state with millions of dollars in attack ads, and they will continue to do everything in their power to flip this seat red.

With all eyes on New Hampshire, it's critical that my campaign has the resources necessary to build a robust on-the-ground campaign that is ready for whatever the GOP throws our way. [**Can you split a donation between my campaign and Voter Protection Project to keep the Senate blue?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/3869?t=7&akid=946%2E878179%2EBubUtd) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $5 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/3870?t=8&akid=946%2E878179%2EBubUtd)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/3871?t=9&akid=946%2E878179%2EBubUtd)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/3872?t=10&akid=946%2E878179%2EBubUtd)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/3873?t=11&akid=946%2E878179%2EBubUtd)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/3869?t=12&akid=946%2E878179%2EBubUtd)
The stakes of this election are high, and this race could decide the fate of the Senate. That's why I'm reaching out to you today, team. Defending our Senate majority is the only way we can stop Mitch McConnell from blocking our progress and enacting his right-wing agenda. What happens in New Hampshire could shape the course of our country for decades.

I’m no stranger to tough fights, and I know we can win this. But it’s not going to be easy, and it’s going to take all of us working together. [**Piece by piece, one dollar at a time, we are going to build the strongest campaign we can. That starts with you, friend -- please split a donation between Voter Protection Project and my campaign today.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/3869?t=13&akid=946%2E878179%2EBubUtd)
Thank you for your support. I couldn’t be more grateful to have you with me.

With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To ending partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=946%2E878179%2EBubUtd). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=946%2E878179%2EBubUtd).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=946%2E878179%2EBubUtd) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=946%2E878179%2EBubUtd). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=946%2E878179%2EBubUtd)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=946%2E878179%2EBubUtd)

name: John Fetterman
subject: re: my weed + pride flags
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
They *officially* filed a complaint about me + my flags at the Pennsylvania State Capitol.
#
Derek,
A right-wing dark money group filed an official complaint with the state of PA about the flags I fly outside my Harrisburg office.
Let me help them out a bit: I have some supporting documentation for their evidence file here. 👇
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37627?refcode=em20211122-3565&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3565%2E434096%2EMJnmNL)
Let me be totally clear, Derek: I won't stop flying my weed + pride flags until both of these things happen, once and for all:
→ 🌈 LGBTQIA+ folks are guaranteed equal justice under law here in PA and across the country
→ ✅ We legalize weed for adult use and expunge the records of every person imprisoned for using the plant
To me, those policies are no-brainers that I'll ALWAYS fight for (despite the best efforts of the GOP and the flag police).
**And it would be my honor to fight for them in the halls of the U.S. Senate if yinz trust me with your vote to flip this crucial Senate seat blue.**
[**_If you're with me in this fight to flip PA and add that vital 51st Democratic vote to the U.S. Senate, will you chip in $5 right now? We're coming up on an important deadline next week, and we're hoping to see a LOT of online donations come in today, especially from Cresco._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37627?refcode=em20211122-3565&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3565%2E434096%2EMJnmNL)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37627?refcode=em20211122-3565&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=3565%2E434096%2EMJnmNL)**
Yours,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37627?refcode=em20211122-3565&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=3565%2E434096%2EMJnmNL)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211122-3565-footer&t=23&refcode2=3565_434096_MJnmNL&akid=3565%2E434096%2EMJnmNL)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=24&akid=3565%2E434096%2EMJnmNL)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=3565%2E434096%2EMJnmNL)

name: China Update
subject: How’s Biden handling China?
body:

We're back with another edition of our weekly recap email. Here's what Sully and the team have been up to! 🗞️ IN THE NEWS What does it say that this was the top news in the Chicago Tribune last week? Watch below to see the full livestream from Saturday night: 📊 ILLINOIS FACT(S) OF THE WEEK Having a pumpkin pie for Thanksgiving this year? name: =?utf-8?Q?Amanda?=
subject: Clearwater Mayor Frank Hibbard Endorses Amanda Makki for Congress!
body:
Mayor Frank Hibbard is announcing his support for Amanda Makki in her race for Congress in FL-13 | | | | [ ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=da43e745ab&e=c2296cffff)
---
| | |
# Clearwater Mayor Frank Hibbard
Endorses Amanda Makki for Congress!
---
|
---
| [ ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=a60cdd1866&e=c2296cffff)
---
|
---
|
---
| [Join Mayor Frank Hibbard in Showing Your Support for Amanda!](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=9bbaaf2e22&e=c2296cffff "Join Mayor Frank Hibbard in Showing Your Support for Amanda!")
---
| Hi Friend,

Leadership across Pinellas County is supporting Amanda Makki for Congress! Mayor Frank Hibbard just added his name to the list of mayors endorsing Amanda Makki. Mayor Hibbard is the eighth mayor to stand behind Amanda in this race.

Amanda Makki has been endorsed by more Pinellas mayors than any other Republican or Democrat in the FL-13 race!
**“I am endorsing Amanda in the race for the Congressional District 13 seat because she is a conservative who I believe can work with others in Washington to get results for Clearwater and Pinellas County,” said Mayor Frank Hibbard. “As the second-largest city in Pinellas, our beaches and transportation infrastructure are important to Clearwater and Amanda has demonstrated her understanding of our needs. I'm also confident that when a constituent calls, Amanda will answer just as the late Congressman Bill Young always did.”**

Mayor Hibbard's endorsement comes just three days after Belleair Mayor Mike Wilkinson announced his support for Amanda. It has been a big week for Amanda Makki for Congress.

Amanda made this statement about how grateful she is for Mayor Hibbard's support:
**“Mayor Hibbard is a man of faith, values, and leadership. These admirable qualities along with his drive to give back and serve the residents of Clearwater are just a few of the reasons I am honored to have his endorsement,” said Amanda Makki. “I am ready to serve the people of Pinellas County in Washington and I’ll never stop fighting for our conservative values.”**
Ready to help Amanda Makki win FL-13? There are many ways you can make a difference in this race. Consider sharing this email with a friend or two, make a contribution to help Amanda, or plan to attend one of Amanda's upcoming events. Keep scrolling for details about her next Meet and Greet!

Want to learn more about Amanda Makki? Check out these links:
* [Where Amanda Stands on the Issues](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=f6cb2a7693&e=c2296cffff)
* [Amanda's Endorsements](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=cdfd7383de&e=c2296cffff)
* [Amanda In the News](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=30ac03a5e2&e=c2296cffff)
* [Press Releases](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=b89da04a9f&e=c2296cffff)
* [Amanda In the Communit](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=2a487b0d09&e=c2296cffff)[y](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=2f53a3b6e8&e=c2296cffff)

clean_body: | | | | Stand up for your freedoms Friend, You and I both knew that Joe Biden’s Shot Mandate was UNCONSTITUTIONAL! Now, a Federal Court has put a stop to the implementation of the mandate due to its serious constitutional concerns. This isn’t the first time “We the People” were right. But we need to stop Joe Biden, Kamala Harris, and Liberal Lisa Murkowski from trying to infringe on our rights! I will fight for our workers, our freedoms, and our families--to do what is right from the beginning! This campaign isn’t about me, it's about YOU! We have to stop the career politicians from stomping on our rights just so they can stay in power! Thanks, Kelly | | | | ==

subject: 6 years ago, I stopped an Islamic terrorist attack

body:
A terrorist emerged from the bathroom, bare-chested and armed with an assault rifle, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=b81f4ba2d41f41229fbff3d99267c9ba&_e=Li-5AFXGdKk0L-q32AtsGZqVRDznASK5LdpnCOkGr__A8EuCFbFIKQeGwvohj1zOxYefy4-VG3p1Mmy3eNnsIiSVU8zPbTGZVcbSgawi1MRv-YZSckSGnaAcLP5cocH3NAJThgVZeB8mTjnKJ-tQ-1TJdS-7rz3jwyGXiGgprLE8CaHXtaFwq9rGKA5WANhixn1ikNGkPSoGS_LMAyBVQ-eOYXd9wxX1H9qec0vj4sCyUkOcgV27OislRgFue_zB02qxBzzLtmuXL5DpB8wYHsJgJdHxbJspQhJ9K7IGTi9_Oh0k8CSDwqAPSj8fYH6tsAaFFc2V1m4y_KNcfwgfTqNnlf951lDEwWVxDbdIN4KCf4LnlMP_q73iLBLyLXd1WNYWbM1VLkFeA8BfbVIvNu4TDfw0yqrw9I8iienpWPRSsqw82ki1HRoRmjAS21d9AX4Q1YcikK8bgTjvpmgoNA%3D%3D)

Peter,

Like so many Americans, I watched the scenes of Afghanistan's fall with disbelief, extreme sadness and even anger. You see, I served the greatest country on Earth in Afghanistan back in 2015. But Afghanistan wasn't the only place I looked terrorism directly in the eyes...

**August 21 st marked six years since the fateful late-summer afternoon that changed my life and those of my two best friends - forever.**

**I had just finished serving our great nation in Afghanistan when my best friends and I decided to take a vacation in Europe**. We were traveling on a Paris-bound train when a terrorist emerged from the bathroom, bare-chested and armed with an assault rifle, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take over and kill us all.

As a soldier, I was trained to take out a terrorist threat -As an American, I was taught to stand up for freedom no matter where I was in the world. **Which is why I, my friends and other brave travelers took the action needed to stop this terrorist.**

This split-second decision prevented what witnesses contend could have become a mass slaughter. There is a reason I was able to make this split-second decision to intervene, Peter - **I have and always will be willing to give my life in the fight for freedom, in the image of true American values.**

[**At the end of this email, I am going to ask you to donate $6 to my campaign for Congress, in honor of the sixth anniversary of the Thalys train attack. But first, you need to understand why we need an American fighter like myself in Washington.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=b81f4ba2d41f41229fbff3d99267c9ba&_e=Li-5AFXGdKk0L-q32AtsGZqVRDznASK5LdpnCOkGr__A8EuCFbFIKQeGwvohj1zOxYefy4-VG3p1Mmy3eNnsIiSVU8zPbTGZVcbSgawi1MRv-YZSckSGnaAcLP5cocH3NAJThgVZeB8mTjnKJ-tQ-1TJdS-7rz3jwyGXiGgprLE8CaHXtaFwq9rGKA5WANhixn1ikNGkPSoGS_LMAyBVQ-eOYXd9wxX1H9qec0vj4sCyUkOcgV27OislRgFue_zBLEgYNKj3RaVIRPIj6FssOCY5nG2P9-bBrndU5R1vbpc0D0kRziL7tqRgCNklceHHCnXzpLTU7wnKtnV6YcFqLKvuZJ71CF4xdyfkm9PaUfkCRdUX_sIBv7WFNIQard_dYgeI8dPIqEVH-MXU8GbnrLLJyyFfkaEYsOQGryUYmNmtI9GrpPRC9EPfksmgniilsyIAJiE32Uuk8436H-RNOA%3D%3D)

[**DONATE $6 TODAY -> **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=b81f4ba2d41f41229fbff3d99267c9ba&_e=Li-5AFXGdKk0L-q32AtsGZqVRDznASK5LdpnCOkGr__A8EuCFbFIKQeGwvohj1zOxYefy4-VG3p1Mmy3eNnsIiSVU8zPbTGZVcbSgawi1MRv-YZSckSGnaAcLP5cocH3NAJThgVZeB8mTjnKJ-tQ-1TJdS-7rz3jwyGXiGgprLE8CaHXtaFwq9rGKA5WANhixn1ikNGkPSoGS_LMAyBVQ-eOYXd9wxX1H9qec0vj4sCyUkOcgV27OislRgFue_zBaXe7PmgCfq78ffBjSxIIqUjAGkNQY33kNSEfuQxnlxglaY4B8saumdSiTDD5Msmp078Q8nlPtk0iYlCuoe31up7FzUHuG-vVBtNBSkEknVE5o9-VpK7Ha4Xt-WRVv4CiwpqSHYfn5jvIXQTvQOGPl0MThMQeWW0edrLihVFS7gE8ggjxUzQ3ecBJ03b23p61jo8H6-H3DxWruXvzP9_E3w%3D%3D)
Now, our homeland is in danger. Not from radical Islamic terrorists, but radical Democrats who want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. Leftist legislation is assaulting our Nation, our communities, and the American Dream.

Right now, Democrats are...
* Opening and destroying our borders. They are g**ranting dangerous amnesty** that will flood every corner of America.
* **Raising our taxes** like we have never seen, and making common goods like gas and groceries unaffordable.
* **Defunding the police,** leading to a surge in violent crime
* **Erasing historical figures** from our schools like George Washington and Abraham Lincoln
* Teetering on the edge of a **dangerous foreign policy crisis**

These power-hungry Democrat elitists like Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden don’t care about the people they represent. **They only care about their own radical agenda, and my opponent, Peter DeFazio is one of the primary offenders.**

The Biden Democrats' grip on power in Washington is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security. The only way to pull America out of this leftist tailspin is by taking back the House in 2022. **We need a fighter in Congress, Peter and I hope that hearing my story proves to you that I am the man for the job.**

My life’s mission has always been to represent the America I know and love - the world’s bastion of freedom and economic prosperity. [**I am taking that mission and putting it into action by running for Congress, by fighting for my neighbors and their wellbeing in Washington.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=b81f4ba2d41f41229fbff3d99267c9ba&_e=Li-5AFXGdKk0L-q32AtsGZqVRDznASK5LdpnCOkGr__A8EuCFbFIKQeGwvohj1zOxYefy4-VG3p1Mmy3eNnsIiSVU8zPbTGZVcbSgawi1MRv-YZSckSGnaAcLP5cocH3NAJThgVZeB8mTjnKJ-tQ-1TJdS-7rz3jwyGXiGgprLE8CaHXtaFwq9rGKA5WANhixn1ikNGkPSoGS_LMAyBVQ-eOYXd9wxX1H9qec0vj4sCyUkOcgV27OislRgFue_zBoN3w0WS-d9btNbUVjX6cAsZXFEfFJYy-pBmXyHS7qC39fTPXhJKulfJ1AvrO5hPI7JdkGQdffiJNJbG6PmVZ33oGG-kmkEOilAowHyJMnYw7KattVNtI331gmFHWv2fgGePsDWR0D-_BCeVc5rJ_Eq5e03O0PxHdwJ5C41S7HcKjOnaJgpysV1aISI-bfv6xDSjz3ks226woTjqb9QFgYg%3D%3D)

This will not be an easy road, which is why I am reaching out to you. I will need the financial support of every American patriot; every single dollar will help. [**Can I count on you to join my team with a donation of $6 - to mark my sixth anniversary of thwarting a terrorist attack?**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=b81f4ba2d41f41229fbff3d99267c9ba&_e=Li-5AFXGdKk0L-q32AtsGZqVRDznASK5LdpnCOkGr__A8EuCFbFIKQeGwvohj1zOxYefy4-VG3p1Mmy3eNnsIiSVU8zPbTGZVcbSgawi1MRv-YZSckSGnaAcLP5cocH3NAJThgVZeB8mTjnKJ-tQ-1TJdS-7rz3jwyGXiGgprLE8CaHXtaFwq9rGKA5WANhixn1ikNGkPSoGS_LMAyBVQ-eOYXd9wxX1H9qec0vj4sCyUkOcgV27OislRgFue_zByAdQc8WDFOT0fydpj7uyCn_SndngtybwWeZsXN2NmGL_B0GnBf2MAP35VvhZtc3oG5e3ikN_XjyfHmwLU7QmkqERajczVxjCZfZa1iPBKPO_s1CuY8Lez8rXF18FgU50WZoO7aWmQN8TUMaE326JUMw_pyVhbIWOUxP2KXWwMriLnUeFnjOQvOzXwA8OmUuVsrP-ZZffTH76Iq9vSoQe8g%3D%3D)

[**DONATE $6 TODAY -> **](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=b81f4ba2d41f41229fbff3d99267c9ba&_e=Li-5AFXGdKk0L-q32AtsGZqVRDznASK5LdpnCOkGr__A8EuCFbFIKQeGwvohj1zOxYefy4-VG3p1Mmy3eNnsIiSVU8zPbTGZVcbSgawi1MRv-YZSckSGnaAcLP5cocH3NAJThgVZeB8mTjnKJ-tQ-1TJdS-7rz3jwyGXiGgprLE8CaHXtaFwq9rGKA5WANhixn1ikNGkPSoGS_LMAyBVQ-eOYXd9wxX1H9qec0vj4sCyUkOcgV27OislRgFue_zBIhhlDpflVtthwdTc-mO0f61uIF7EyY1TnoT7wvpyk2NYNp0ovenMNwX_wuawZ_Z9UEx0iXdtHwdS4I7kCLsvNH_x-eKxiBf10eEDB8lrMuFsuDFjb3Kwc88cE2Y-4SXD-o5de4nkCeRaG1fThGUXuybXp-YVCIs1PwhOrQjuckGg_-hqIBS3SzruVA9rPpqUqK3wed9Y0XXfkEQGUSETPA%3D%3D)

Thank you very much,
Alek Skarlatos
Republican for Congress

| Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. His heroism earned him several awards and medals around the world. August 21 st marked six years since the fateful late-summer afternoon that changed my life and those of my two best friends - forever. I had just finished serving our great nation in Afghanistan when my best friends and I decided to take a vacation in Europe. We were traveling on a Paris-bound train when a terrorist emerged from the bathroom, bare-chested and armed with an assault rifle, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take over and kill us all. As a soldier, I was trained to take out a terrorist threat -As an American, I was taught to stand up for freedom no matter where I was in the world. Which is why I, my friends and other brave travelers took the action needed to stop this terrorist. This split-second decision prevented what witnesses contend could have become a mass slaughter. There is a reason I was able to make this split-second decision to intervene, Peter - I have and always will be willing to give my life in the fight for freedom, in the image of true American values. Now, our homeland is in danger. Not from radical Islamic terrorists, but radical Democrats who want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. Leftist legislation is assaulting our Nation, our communities, and the American Dream. Right now, Democrats are... Opening and destroying our borders. They are granting dangerous amnesty that will flood every corner of America. Raising our taxes like we have never seen, and making common goods like gas and groceries unaffordable. Defunding the police, leading to a surge in violent crime Erasing historical figures from our schools like George Washington and Abraham Lincoln Teetering on the edge of a dangerous foreign policy crisis These power-hungry Democrat elitists like Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden don’t care about the people they represent. They only care about their own radical agenda, and my opponent, Peter DeFazio is one of the primary offenders. The Biden Democrats' grip on power in Washington is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security. The only way to pull America out of this leftist tailspin is by taking back the House in 2022. We need a fighter in Congress, Peter and I hope that hearing my story proves to you that I am the man for the job.** My life’s mission has always been to represent the America I know and love - the world’s bastion of freedom and economic prosperity. This will not be an easy road, which is why I am reaching out to you. I will need the financial support of every American patriot; every single dollar will help. Thank you very much, Alek Skarlatos Republican for Congress | Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. His heroism earned him several awards and medals around the world. ---|--- | ---|--- Alek Skarlatos is a former Oregon National Guardsman. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of Homeland Security or the Department of Defense. | Paid For By Alek For Oregon Don't want to receive any more of our emails?

name: =?utf-8?Q?Brice=20Wiggins?=
subject: Brice Wiggins for Congress: Highlights from the Campaign Trail 🇺🇸
body:
View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/9f26bd8d77e4/brice-wiggins-for-congress-highlights-from-the-campaign-trail?e=698f056321)
Logo

Dear Supporters,

Our campaign is off to an amazing start! We’ve been traveling all across the 4th Congressional District because I truly believe you cannot serve the people without talking to them face to face. This newsletter update contains photos of just a small sampling (4) of 18+ events I’ve participated in since November 1. If you click on a picture, it will take you to our Facebook page featuring all of our posts about activities, events and issues.

More Americans Disapprove of How Congress is Handling Its Job

Americans tend to see Congress as a group of ineffectual politicians who are out of touch with their constituents. The poll linked below is taken each month answering the question, “Do you approve or disapprove of the way Congress is handling its job?” It shows that in October, 75% of Americans “disapprove” while 21% approve. The number who DISAPPROVE has been steadily rising and is at its highest level since Dec. 2020. View more here. (https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=b81fb03a20&e=698f056321)

I agree with that majority of Americans who disapprove of how Congress is handling its job, and that is why I am running for Congress. There is no reason that number should be so highe, and I want to represent you to do something about it. We deserve better! Congress is there to do a job and clearly they aren’t. My record shows that I will not be just more of the same, but rather someone who gets things done.

Many of you have offered your support, encouragement and financial support. I truly cannot thank you enough. If you have not given to our campaign and would like to make a donation, CLICK HERE (https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=bb67cce38d&e=698f056321) or on the button below. Also, many of you have let the campaign know about events and have offered to host Meet and Greets, fundraisers and more. Please keep it up! We want to be in as many places as we can be, so if you know of something coming up, please share it with the campaign through EMAIL (mailto:info@bricewiggins.ms) or by phone at (601) 385-3420.

Thank you again, please take a look at the posts below and click through to see more of what’s been happening on the campaign trail.

Sincerely,
DONATE (https://bricewiggins.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=094d93d9b142a07f60f23dbdd&id=05a19fb63d&e=698f056321)

name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: Re: Waukesha
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
Friends —

By now, you have probably seen the news about the tragic incident in Waukesha last night. My heart is with the families, children, first responders, and community members impacted by last night’s senseless act of violence.

When faced with unspeakable tragedy, Wisconsinites show incredible strength and compassion by coming together and lending a hand. We're already seeing that here. If you want to add your support, here’s how you can make an immediate difference:

Waukesha County Community Foundation and United Way of Greater Milwaukee & Waukesha County have joined together to create the “United for Waukesha Community Fund.” This fund will support the needs of the families impacted at the Waukesha Christmas Parade.

**[Please consider making a contribution to the United for Waukesha Community Fund. Your donation could make an important difference in someone’s life today. Click here to add yours and then, continue reading for additional resources below.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38912543/317596476/-399304848?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTUyY2FhNi0wYzRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8aXYvrcmvlnvQqIaowCzR5sUTfAHXGbPef0DNLqF4Pw=&emci=51f04f8b-064c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=0e52caa6-0c4c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=18659593)**
_100% of your donation will go directly to the community fund._
With so much going on in the news, I know it can all feel so overwhelming. That’s why I wanted to take a moment to share how we can all show our support for the Waukesha community. But I know these are challenging times, so if you cannot afford to pitch in right now, that’s okay.

The most important thing you can do is take care of your family, loved ones, and neighbors. We’ll get through this together.

— Sarah

* * *

If you know people who were at the Waukesha Christmas Parade and need help, here are some resources to share:
* Call or text the Disaster Distress Helpline at 800-985-5990 if you are experiencing emotional distress — trained counselors are available 24/7. Please only call 911 for emergencies.

* If you are looking for family members and live out of town, call 262-548-7122.

* Friends and Family Resource Center will be at Carroll University in the Campus Center ballroom for all the victims from 2:00–6:00 pm on Tuesday and 9:00 am–1:00 pm on Wednesday. The District Attorney Victim Assistance Program is also available to assist. You can email **[help4victims@da.wi.gov.](mailto:help4victims@da.wi.gov)**

* Talking to your kids about trauma is never easy — here’s **[a helpful guide for parents](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38912544/317596477/28487550?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTUyY2FhNi0wYzRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8aXYvrcmvlnvQqIaowCzR5sUTfAHXGbPef0DNLqF4Pw=&emci=51f04f8b-064c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=0e52caa6-0c4c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=18659593)** from a certified child life specialist at Children’s Wisconsin in the wake of tragedy in Waukesha.

* Make an appointment to give blood by finding a location **[here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38912545/317596478/382501649?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTUyY2FhNi0wYzRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8aXYvrcmvlnvQqIaowCzR5sUTfAHXGbPef0DNLqF4Pw=&emci=51f04f8b-064c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=0e52caa6-0c4c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=18659593)** or **[here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38912546/317596479/541637230?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTUyY2FhNi0wYzRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8aXYvrcmvlnvQqIaowCzR5sUTfAHXGbPef0DNLqF4Pw=&emci=51f04f8b-064c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=0e52caa6-0c4c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=18659593)**

* Items left at the scene that did not have an ID will be at the Park, Rec, and Forestry Dept, 1900 Aviation Dr. on Tuesday and Wednesday from 8:00 am–4:30 pm.

| Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
---
Sarah for Wisconsin
PO Box 166
Madison, WI 53701
United States
---
This message was sent to **dpwillis67@gmail.com.** Emails like this are the best way for us to stay in touch, but if you need to go, please **[unsubscribe here.](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/51f04f8b-064c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8/0e52caa6-0c4c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTUyY2FhNi0wYzRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8aXYvrcmvlnvQqIaowCzR5sUTfAHXGbPef0DNLqF4Pw=&id=121241219)** If you only wish to receive our most important updates, **[submit this form for fewer emails](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/38912547/317596480/1446289968?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTUyY2FhNi0wYzRjLWVjMTEtOTgyMC1jODk2NjUzYjI2YzgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8aXYvrcmvlnvQqIaowCzR5sUTfAHXGbPef0DNLqF4Pw=&emci=51f04f8b-064c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=0e52caa6-0c4c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&ceid=18659593)**. If you are a registered lobbyist and have received this email in error, please **[contact us here.](mailto:info@sarahforwisconsin.com)**

Have a question? Reply to this email.

clean_body: This weekend I joined a Folding Chair Sessions roundtable with Elect Black Women and two other trailblazing candidates for Congress | | | Peter, This weekend I joined a Folding Chair Sessions roundtable with Elect Black Women and two other trailblazing candidates for Congress, Kina Collins and Attica Scott. We discussed how we have to uplift the voices and the policy concerns of Black women, the future of Congress, and the needs of our communities. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: Peter, our movement has already accomplished a lot. We raised more money for this campaign than any other Black woman in Nashville history. And together, we can unseat a conservative incumbent Congressman, too. If we’re going to get any of the changes that we need to see happen, we have to change our representative first. I know we’re capable of it. With gratitude, Odessa Odessa Kelly Candidate for Tennessee’s 5th Congressional District | To give by check: Odessa for Congress 2817 West End Ave, Ste 126-401 Nashville, TN 37203

Kevin McCarthy has stooped to a new low, folks.

Instead of immediately coming out against Paul Gosar, a member of his own caucus, tweeting out a video depicting the murder of Representative Ocasio-Cortez, Kevin McCarthy was silent for days, only recently making a lackluster statement about the tweet before pivoting to Republican talking points on the House floor.

**Then, he even said that Rep. Gosar and Marjorie Taylor Greene would be rewarded for their reprehensible behavior if Republicans win the House in 2022.**

This is a new low, but we’re not surprised.

McCarthy is bending to the whims of the far-right mob that attacked the Capitol on January 6, and he is too scared to cross them, no matter how far they go.

**[McCarthy is an embarrassment to America. clean_body: His silence is deafening. | | | Kevin McCarthy has stooped to a new low, folks. Instead of immediately coming out against Paul Gosar, a member of his own caucus, tweeting out a video depicting the murder of Representative Ocasio-Cortez, Kevin McCarthy was silent for days, only recently making a lackluster statement about the tweet before pivoting to Republican talking points on the House floor. Then, he even said that Rep. Gosar and Marjorie Taylor Greene would be rewarded for their reprehensible behavior if Republicans win the House in 2022. This is a new low, but we’re not surprised. McCarthy is bending to the whims of the far-right mob that attacked the Capitol on January 6, and he is too scared to cross them, no matter how far they go. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately. We’ve had enough, Bruno for Congress | | ---|--- Paid for by Bruno Amato for Congress PO BOX 22472 BAKERSFIELD, CA 93390

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: After Kenosha
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Last week, a jury in Kenosha, Wisconsin failed to convict Kyle Rittenhouse
in his murder trial. Rittenhouse killed two people and injured another
with an AR-15 at a Black Lives Matter protest last summer after Jacob
Blake was shot by police.

His acquittal is an example of how our criminal legal system can be unjust
and racist. It serves as a reminder of the dangers of the so-called Stand
Your Ground and self-defense laws in states across the country that
encourage shootings, deadly force, and violent extremism when such
violence could have been avoided.

So, today, we’re asking that you join us in donating to Black Leaders
Organizing for Communities (BLOC) Action — an organization that works to
ensure a high quality of life and access to opportunities for members of
the Black community in Milwaukee and throughout Wisconsin.

BLOC is focused on ushering in an era of equity by championing issues that
disproportionately affect communities of color like housing, health care,
and gun violence. They are working every day to create a Milwaukee, and
Wisconsin, where Black and Brown families have an equal opportunity to
thrive.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/84507?refcode=em20211122-justicedemocrats&t=1002&akid=20625%2E1203867%2E_Wh00x ]Community organizing in every part of the country is a major way we
will create change. Can you make a donation today to BLOC to support deep
organizing for BIPOC communities in Wisconsin?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/84507?refcode=em20211122-justicedemocrats&t=1003&akid=20625%2E1203867%2E_Wh00x ]Donate to BLOC

Together, we can uplift BIPOC communities in Wisconsin and across the
country.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1004&akid=20625%2E1203867%2E_Wh00x ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1005&akid=20625%2E1203867%2E_Wh00x ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20211122-20625-footer&t=1006&refcode2=20625_1203867__Wh00x&akid=20625%2E1203867%2E_Wh00x

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1007&akid=20625%2E1203867%2E_Wh00x

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Roger Stone
subject: Statement of Roger J. Stone Jr. regarding the January 6th Committee Subpoena -
body:
| |
---
**ROGER STONE**
Ft. Lauderdale, Florida
---
| I understand that I have been included in this round of subpoenas issued by the January 6th Select Committee. I have not yet been served and have not seen the details of what I may be asked to provide or what information they want from me. I have said time and time again that I had no advance knowledge of the events that took place at the Capitol on that day. Any statement, claim, insinuation, or report alleging, or even implying, that I had any involvement in or knowledge, whether advance or contemporaneous, about the commission of any unlawful acts by any person or group in or around the U.S. Capitol or anywhere in Washington, D.C. on January 6, 2021, is categorically false. After the subpoena is served and after my counsel reviews the requests, I will make the determination of how I will proceed. Roger Stone [www.stonedefensefund.com](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/click/?sid=00ab0c0ppkr2waok2o2wkpm&linkid=0&link=7258f6b40b6241a287b0247b46266a9d)
---

[One-Click Unsubscribe](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/unsubscribe/?sid=00ab0c0ppkr2waok2o2wkpm) [Report Spam](https://DIQ27272.trk.directiq13.com/unsolicited/?sid=00ab0c0ppkr2waok2o2wkpm) [Web Version](https://www.directiq13.com/IO/viewer3.aspx?sid=00ab0c0ppkr2waok2o2wkpm)
---

name: CheriBeasley.com
subject: Our grassroots campaign is up against untold sums of money.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
For a grassroots campaign like ours, each donation adds up in powerful ways.
#

**$4,035,557.53**
That’s how much the Club for Growth super PAC has dumped into this race already. They’re putting millions of dollars into ads to prop up our Republican opponent and Trump-endorsed candidate Ted Budd, and they’ve pledged to spend even more.
**$275,000**
As of the October filing, this is the amount of his own money that Ted Budd has funneled into his campaign. He’s shown he will write massive checks to his campaign, and there’s no telling how much of his own money he’s willing to spend to buy this seat for himself.
**Six-figures???**
Ok, we don’t know exactly how much Donald Trump raised for Ted Budd, but we do know he held a massive high-dollar fundraiser at his Mar-a-Lago mansion just days ago. It was undoubtedly a massive sum from lots of Trump’s wealthy special interest donors.
**$3**
That’s how much we’re asking you to contribute today. It may not seem like the kind of money that can compete with super PACs, self-funders and Trump’s special interest donors, but for a grassroots campaign like ours, each donation adds up in powerful ways.
**[Make that $3 donation today for Cheri and help us elect a champion for working people to the Senate. We’re counting on lots of grassroots donations to compete with Republicans’ untold sums of money.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-nov21?refcode=em211122-1-t2&refcode2=50.357359.EXdmi7&t=1&akid=50%2E357359%2EEXdmi7)**

name: Team AOC
subject: Food insecurity in the Bronx and Queens
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
In anticipation of the Thanksgiving holiday this Thursday, we’ve been raising funds for three local organizations in the Bronx and Queens to put food on the table for low-income families and neighbors in our community.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20211122-2655-header&t=1&akid=2655%2E2526796%2Ejxhq5o)
Many members of our community continue to face food insecurity, and Team AOC has invested in fundraising efforts and partnerships to support local organizations’ food distribution programs throughout COVID and beyond.
**In anticipation of the Thanksgiving holiday this Thursday, we’ve been raising funds for three local organizations in the Bronx and Queens** to put food on the table for low-income families and neighbors in our community.
[If you’re able to lend a hand, please chip in $6 or whatever you can afford to help us ramp up food distribution efforts this Thanksgiving >>](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211122?refcode=em20211122-2655-P_FND_CHA_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&refcode2=2655_2526796_jxhq5o&akid=2655%2E2526796%2Ejxhq5o)
**[Contribute to Food Relief →](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211122?refcode=em20211122-2655-P_FND_CHA_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=2655_2526796_jxhq5o&akid=2655%2E2526796%2Ejxhq5o)**
100% of your donation will go to these three organizations:
* **La Jornada NY Food Pantry** is a food pantry service located in the heart of Queens that has delivered hundreds of meals to the immigrant and poor communities of Queens.

* **Relief Access Program for The Bronx**(also known as Rap4Bronx) provides food, prepared meals, and groceries to community members. Last year, they distributed 500 turkeys and 800 pantry bags for Thanksgiving! They’re hoping to exceed these numbers this year.

* **Jewish Community Council of Pelham Parkway** operates the largest food pantry in the East Bronx. They distribute over 1,200 food packages per month which include three meals a day for three days for each member of the household.

We’ve seen this movement step up to achieve incredible things before, **and we need your help to continue to provide urgent relief to those in need – especially during the holidays.**
[If you are able to donate, please pitch in $6 – or whatever you can afford – and your donation will be automatically split between these three organizations providing direct food relief.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211122?refcode=em20211122-2655-P_FND_CHA_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=2655_2526796_jxhq5o&akid=2655%2E2526796%2Ejxhq5o)
Thank you,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20211122?refcode=em20211122-2655-P_FND_CHA_GOL&t=23&refcode2=2655_2526796_jxhq5o&akid=2655%2E2526796%2Ejxhq5o)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20211122-2655-P_FND_CHA_GOL&t=24&akid=2655%2E2526796%2Ejxhq5o)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=25&akid=2655%2E2526796%2Ejxhq5o) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=26&akid=2655%2E2526796%2Ejxhq5o) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=27&akid=2655%2E2526796%2Ejxhq5o)
---|---|---
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=28&akid=2655%2E2526796%2Ejxhq5o)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=29&akid=2655%2E2526796%2Ejxhq5o)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
